import SummarizeCheckStatus from './summarize-check-status.js';

/**
 * 处理摘要功能
 */
class Summarizer {
    /**
     * 创建一个新的 Summarizer
     * @param {Object} enhancer - 父 HNEnhancer 实例
     */
    constructor(enhancer) {
        this.enhancer = enhancer;
        this.isChomeAiAvailable = 'no';
    }

    /**
     * 初始化 Chrome 内置 AI
     */
    initChromeBuiltinAI() {
        // 注入 origin trial token 以启用 'news.ycombinator.com' 源的摘要 API
        const otMeta = document.createElement('meta');
        otMeta.httpEquiv = 'origin-trial';
        otMeta.content = 'Ah+d1HFcvvHgG3aB5OfzNzifUv02EpQfyQBlED1zXGCt8oA+XStg86q5zAwr7Y/UFDCmJEnPi019IoJIoeTPugsAAABgeyJvcmlnaW4iOiJodHRwczovL25ld3MueWNvbWJpbmF0b3IuY29tOjQ0MyIsImZlYXR1cmUiOiJBSVN1bW1hcml6YXRpb25BUEkiLCJleHBpcnkiOjE3NTMxNDI0MDB9';
        document.head.prepend(otMeta);

        this.isChomeAiAvailable = 'no';

        // 1. 将脚本注入网页上下文
        const pageScript = document.createElement('script');
        pageScript.src = chrome.runtime.getURL('page-script.js');
        (document.head || document.documentElement).appendChild(pageScript);

        pageScript.onload = () => {
            window.postMessage({
                type: 'HN_CHECK_AI_AVAILABLE',
                data: {}
            });
        }

        // 2. 监听来自网页的消息
        window.addEventListener('message', (event) => {
            // 拒绝来自其他域的所有消息
            if (event.origin !== window.location.origin) {
                return;
            }

            // 处理不同的消息类型
            switch (event.data.type) {
                case 'HN_CHECK_AI_AVAILABLE_RESPONSE':
                    const available = event.data.data.available;
                    this.isChomeAiAvailable = available;
                    this.enhancer.logDebug('来自页面脚本 Chrome 内置 AI 的消息。HN_CHECK_AI_AVAILABLE_RESPONSE: ', this.isChomeAiAvailable);
                    break;

                case 'HN_AI_SUMMARIZE_RESPONSE':
                    const responseData = event.data.data;
                    if(responseData.error) {
                        this.enhancer.summaryPanel.updateContent({
                            title: '摘要错误',
                            text: responseData.error
                        });
                        return;
                    }

                    // 摘要成功。在面板中显示摘要
                    const summary = responseData.summary;
                    const commentPathToIdMap = responseData.commentPathToIdMap;
                    this.enhancer.showSummaryInPanel(summary, commentPathToIdMap).catch(error => {
                        console.error('显示摘要时出错:', error);
                    });
                    break;

                default:
                    break;
            }
        });
    }

    /**
     * 检查文本是否应该被摘要
     * @param {string} formattedText - 格式化的文本
     * @param {number} commentDepth - 评论深度
     * @param {string} aiProvider - AI 提供商
     * @returns {Object} - 检查结果
     */
    shouldSummarizeText(formattedText, commentDepth, aiProvider) {
        // Ollama 可以处理各种数据 - 大型、小型、深度线程。所以返回 true
        if (aiProvider === 'ollama') {
            return { status: SummarizeCheckStatus.OK };
        }

        // Chrome 内置 AI 无法处理深度线程，因此将摘要限制为一定深度
        if (aiProvider === 'chrome-ai') {
            return commentDepth <= 5
                ? { status: SummarizeCheckStatus.OK }
                : { status: SummarizeCheckStatus.THREAD_TOO_DEEP };
        }

        // OpenAI 和 Claude 可以处理更大的数据，但它们很昂贵，所以应该有最小长度和深度
        const minSentenceLength = 8;
        const minCommentDepth = 3;
        const sentences = formattedText.split(/[.!?]+(?:\s+|$)/)
            .filter(sentence => sentence.trim().length > 0);

        if (sentences.length <= minSentenceLength) {
            return { status: SummarizeCheckStatus.TEXT_TOO_SHORT };
        }
        if (commentDepth <= minCommentDepth) {
            return { status: SummarizeCheckStatus.THREAD_TOO_SHALLOW };
        }

        return { status: SummarizeCheckStatus.OK };
    }

    /**
     * 获取摘要的系统消息
     * @returns {string} - 系统消息
     */
    getSystemMessage() {
        return `
You are an AI assistant specialized in analyzing and summarizing Hacker News discussions.
Your goal is to help users quickly understand the key discussions and insights from Hacker News threads without having to read through lengthy comment sections.
A discussion consists of threaded comments where each comment can have child comments (replies) nested underneath it, forming interconnected conversation branches.
Your task is to provide concise, meaningful summaries that capture the essence of the discussion while prioritizing high quality content.
Follow these guidelines:

1. Discussion Structure Understanding:
   Comments are formatted as: [hierarchy_path] (score: X) <replies: Y> {downvotes: Z} Author: Comment

   - hierarchy_path: Shows the comment's position in the discussion tree
     - Single number [1] indicates a top-level comment
     - Each additional number represents one level deeper in the reply chain. e.g., [1.2.1] is a reply to [1.2]
     - The full path preserves context of how comments relate to each other

   - score: A normalized value between 1000 and 1, representing the comment's relative importance
     - 1000 represents the highest-value comment in the discussion
     - Other scores are proportionally scaled against this maximum
     - Higher scores indicate more upvotes from the community and content quality

   - replies: Number of direct responses to this comment

   - downvotes: Number of downvotes the comment received
     - Exclude comments with high downvotes from the summary
     - DO NOT include comments that are have 4 or more downvotes

   Example discussion:
   [1] (score: 1000) <replies: 3> {downvotes: 0} user1: Main point as the first reply to the post
   [1.1] (score: 800) <replies: 1> {downvotes: 0} user2: Supporting argument or counter point in response to [1]
   [1.1.1] (score: 150) <replies: 0> {downvotes: 6} user3: Additional detail as response to [1.1], but should be excluded due to more than 4 downvotes
   [2] (score: 400) <replies: 1> {downvotes: 0} user4: Comment with a theme different from [1]
   [2.1] (score: 250) <replies: 0> {downvotes: 1} user2: Counter point to [2], by previous user2, but should have lower priority due to low score and 1 downvote
   [3] (score: 200) <replies: 0> {downvotes: 0} user5: Another top-level comment with a different perspective

2. Content Prioritization:
   - Focus on high-scoring comments as they represent valuable community insights
   - Pay attention to comments with many replies as they sparked discussion
   - Track how discussions evolve through the hierarchy
   - Consider the combination of score, downvotes AND replies to gauge overall importance, prioritizing insightful, well-reasoned, and informative content

3. Theme Identification:
   - Use top-level comments ([1], [2], etc.) to identify main discussion themes
   - Identify recurring themes across top-level comments
   - Look for comments that address similar aspects of the main post or propose related ideas.
   - Group related top-level comments into thematic clusters
   - Track how each theme develops through reply chains

4. Quality Assessment:
    - Prioritize comments that exhibit a combination of high score, low downvotes, substantial replies, and depth of content
    - High scores indicate community agreement, downvotes indicate comments not aligned with Hacker News guidelines or community standards
    - Replies suggest engagement and discussion, and depth (often implied by longer or more detailed comments) can signal valuable insights or expertise
    - Actively identify and highlight expert explanations or in-depth analyses. These are often found in detailed responses, comments with high scores, or from users who demonstrate expertise on the topic

Based on the above instructions, you should summarize the discussion. Your output should be well-structured, informative, and easily digestible for someone who hasn't read the original thread.

Your response should be formatted using markdown and should have the following structure.

# Overview
Brief summary of the overall discussion in 2-3 sentences - adjust based on complexity and depth of comments.

# Main Themes & Key Insights
[Bulleted list of themes, ordered by community engagement (combination of scores and replies). Order themes based on the overall community engagement they generated. Each bullet should be a summary with 2 or 3 sentences, adjusted based on the complexity of the topic.]

# [Theme 1 title - from the first bullet above]
[Summarize key insights or arguments under this theme in a couple of sentences. Use bullet points.]
[Identify important quotes and include them here with hierarchy_paths so that we can link back to the comment in the main page. Include direct "quotations" (with author attribution) where appropriate. You MUST quote directly from users with double quotes. You MUST include hierarchy_path as well. Do NOT include comments with 4 or more downvotes. For example:
- [1.1.1] (user3) noted, '...'
- [2.1] (user2) explained that '...'"
- [3] Perspective from (user5) added, "..."
- etc.

# [Theme 2 title - from the second bullet in the main themes section]
[Same structure as above.]

# [Theme 3 title and 4 title - if the discussion has more themes]

# Key Perspectives
[Present contrasting perspectives, noting their community reception. When including key quotes, you MUST include hierarchy_paths and author, so that we can link back to the comment in the main page.]
[Present these concisely and highlight any significant community reactions (agreement, disagreement, etc.)]
[Watch for community consensus or disagreements]

# Notable Side Discussions
[Interesting tangents that added value. When including key quotes, you MUST include hierarchy_paths and author, so that we can link back to the comment in the main page]
`;
    }

    /**
     * 获取摘要的用户消息
     * @param {string} title - 帖子标题
     * @param {string} text - 要摘要的文本
     * @returns {Promise<string>} - 用户消息
     */
    async getUserMessage(title, text) {
        const {language} = await this.enhancer.getAIProviderModel();

        // 基于所选语言的语言输出指令
        let languageInstruction = '';
        if (language !== 'en') {
            const languageInstructions = {
                'zh': 'Please respond in Chinese (中文).',
                'es': 'Please respond in Spanish (Español).',
                'fr': 'Please respond in French (Français).',
                'de': 'Please respond in German (Deutsch).',
                'ja': 'Please respond in Japanese (日本語).',
                'ko': 'Please respond in Korean (한국어).',
                'ru': 'Please respond in Russian (Русский).',
                'pt': 'Please respond in Portuguese (Português).',
                'it': 'Please respond in Italian (Italiano).'
            };

            languageInstruction = languageInstructions[language] || '';
        }

        // 带有末尾语言指令的单一提示模板
        const prompt = `Provide a concise and insightful summary of the following Hacker News discussion, as per the guidelines you've been given.
The goal is to help someone quickly grasp the main discussion points and key perspectives without reading all comments.
Please focus on extracting the main themes, significant viewpoints, and high-quality contributions.
The post title and comments are separated by three dashed lines:
---
Post Title:
${title}
---
Comments:
${text}
---
${languageInstruction}`;

        return prompt;
    }

    /**
     * 从文本中删除锚点
     * @param {string} text - 要处理的文本
     * @returns {string} - 处理后的文本
     */
    stripAnchors(text) {
        // 使用正则表达式匹配 <a> 标签及其内容
        const anchorRegex = /<a\b[^>]*>.*?<\/a>/g;

        // 将所有匹配项替换为空字符串
        return text.replace(anchorRegex, '');
    }

    /**
     * 在令牌限制处拆分输入文本
     * @param {string} text - 要拆分的文本
     * @param {number} tokenLimit - 令牌限制
     * @returns {string} - 拆分后的文本
     */
    splitInputTextAtTokenLimit(text, tokenLimit) {
        // 每个字符的近似令牌计数
        const TOKENS_PER_CHAR = 0.25;

        // 如果文本足够短，则按原样返回
        if (text.length * TOKENS_PER_CHAR < tokenLimit) {
            return text;
        }

        // 将文本拆分为行
        const lines = text.split('\n');
        let outputText = '';
        let currentTokenCount = 0;

        // 遍历每一行并累积，直到达到令牌限制
        for (const line of lines) {
            const lineTokenCount = line.length * TOKENS_PER_CHAR;
            if (currentTokenCount + lineTokenCount >= tokenLimit) {
                break;
            }
            outputText += line + '\n';
            currentTokenCount += lineTokenCount;
        }

        return outputText;
    }

    /**
     * 使用 Chrome 内置 AI 摘要文本
     * @param {string} formattedComment - 格式化的评论
     * @param {Map} commentPathToIdMap - 评论路径到 ID 的映射
     */
    async summarizeUsingChromeBuiltInAI(formattedComment, commentPathToIdMap) {
        if(this.isChomeAiAvailable === 'no') {
            this.enhancer.summaryPanel.updateContent({
                title: 'AI 不可用',
                metadata: 'Chrome 内置 AI 已禁用或不可用',
                text: `无法生成摘要：您的设备上未启用 Chrome 的 AI 功能。
                       <br><br>
                       要启用和测试 Chrome AI：
                       <br>
                       1. 访问 <a class="underline" href="https://chrome.dev/web-ai-demos/summarization-api-playground/" target="_blank">Chrome AI Playground</a>
                       <br>
                       2. 尝试运行测试摘要
                       <br>
                       3. 如果问题仍然存在，请检查您的 Chrome 设置并确保您使用的是兼容版本`
            });
            return;
        }

        if(this.isChomeAiAvailable === 'after-download') {
            this.enhancer.summaryPanel.updateContent({
                metadata: '正在下载 Chrome 内置 AI 模型',
                text: `Chrome 内置 AI 模型将在下载后可用。这可能需要一些时间。`
            });
        }

        // 获取语言设置
        const {language} = await this.enhancer.getAIProviderModel();

        // 通过将文本传递给页面脚本来摘要文本，页面脚本将调用 Chrome AI API
        window.postMessage({
            type: 'HN_AI_SUMMARIZE',
            data: {
                text: formattedComment,
                commentPathToIdMap: commentPathToIdMap,
                language: language
            }
        });
    }

    /**
     * 使用 OpenAI 摘要文本
     * @param {string} text - 要摘要的文本
     * @param {string} model - 要使用的模型
     * @param {string} apiKey - API 密钥
     * @param {Map} commentPathToIdMap - 评论路径到 ID 的映射
     */
    async summarizeUsingOpenAI(text, model, apiKey, commentPathToIdMap) {
        // 验证所需参数
        if (!text || !model || !apiKey) {
            console.error('OpenAI 摘要缺少必要参数');
            this.enhancer.summaryPanel.updateContent({
                title: '错误',
                text: '缺少 API 配置'
            });
            return;
        }

        try {
            // OpenAI 的速率限制
            // gpt-4-turbo      - 30,000 TPM
            // gpt-3.5-turbo    - 16,000 TPM
            const tokenLimit = model === 'gpt-4-turbo' ? 25_000 : 15_000;
            const tokenLimitText = this.splitInputTextAtTokenLimit(text, tokenLimit);

            // 创建系统和用户提示以获得更好的摘要
            const systemPrompt = this.getSystemMessage();
            const postTitle = this.enhancer.getHNPostTitle();
            const userPrompt = await this.getUserMessage(postTitle, tokenLimitText);

            // OpenAI 接受具有角色（系统/用户）和内容的系统和用户消息数组
            const messages = [{
                role: "system",
                content: systemPrompt
            }, {
                role: "user",
                content: userPrompt
            }];

            // 使用后台消息发出 API 请求
            const response = await this.enhancer.sendBackgroundMessage('OPENAI_API_REQUEST', {
                apiKey: apiKey,
                model: model,
                messages: messages
            });

            // 从响应中提取摘要
            const summary = response?.choices[0]?.message?.content;
            if (!summary) {
                throw new Error('API 响应未生成摘要');
            }

            // 使用生成的摘要更新摘要面板
            await this.enhancer.showSummaryInPanel(summary, commentPathToIdMap, response.duration);

        } catch (error) {
            console.error('OpenAI 摘要出错:', error);

            // 使用错误消息更新摘要面板
            let errorMessage = `使用 OpenAI 模型 ${model} 生成摘要时出错。`;
            if (error.message.includes('API key')) {
                errorMessage += '请检查您的 API 密钥配置。';
            } else if (error.message.includes('429') ) {
                errorMessage += '超出速率限制。请稍后再试。';
            } else if (error.message.includes('current quota')) {
                errorMessage += 'API 配额已超出。请稍后再试。';  // OpenAI 有每日配额
            }
            else {
                errorMessage += error.message + ' 请稍后再试。';
            }

            this.enhancer.summaryPanel.updateContent({
                title: '错误',
                text: errorMessage
            });
        }
    }

    /**
     * 使用 OpenRouter 摘要文本
     * @param {string} text - 要摘要的文本
     * @param {string} model - 要使用的模型
     * @param {string} apiKey - API 密钥
     * @param {Map} commentPathToIdMap - 评论路径到 ID 的映射
     */
    async summarizeUsingOpenRouter(text, model, apiKey, commentPathToIdMap) {
        // 验证所需参数
        if (!text || !model || !apiKey) {
            console.error('OpenRouter 摘要缺少必要参数');
            this.enhancer.summaryPanel.updateContent({
                title: '错误',
                text: '缺少 API 配置'
            });
            return;
        }

        try {
            // OpenRouter 的速率限制
            const tokenLimit = 60000;
            const tokenLimitText = this.splitInputTextAtTokenLimit(text, tokenLimit);

            // 创建系统和用户提示以获得更好的摘要
            const systemPrompt = this.getSystemMessage();
            const postTitle = this.enhancer.getHNPostTitle();
            const userPrompt = await this.getUserMessage(postTitle, tokenLimitText);

            // OpenRouter，就像 OpenAI 一样，接受具有角色（系统/用户）和内容的系统和用户消息数组
            const messages = [{
                role: "system",
                content: systemPrompt
            }, {
                role: "user",
                content: userPrompt
            }];

            // 使用后台消息发出 API 请求
            const response = await this.enhancer.sendBackgroundMessage('OPENROUTER_API_REQUEST', {
                apiKey: apiKey,
                model: model,
                messages: messages
            });

            // 从响应中提取摘要
            const summary = response?.choices[0]?.message?.content;
            if (!summary) {
                throw new Error('API 响应未生成摘要');
            }

            // 使用生成的摘要更新摘要面板
            await this.enhancer.showSummaryInPanel(summary, commentPathToIdMap, response.duration);

        } catch (error) {
            console.error('OpenRouter 摘要出错:', error);

            // 使用错误消息更新摘要面板
            // OpenRouter 遵循与 OpenAI 相同的错误消息结构
            // https://openrouter.ai/docs/errors
            let errorMessage = `使用 OpenRouter 模型 ${model} 生成摘要时出错。`;
            if (error.message.includes('API key')) {
                errorMessage += '请检查您的 API 密钥配置。';
            } else if (error.message.includes('429')) {
                errorMessage += '超出速率限制。请稍后再试。';
            } else if (error.message.includes('current quota')) {
                errorMessage += 'API 配额已超出。请稍后再试。';
            }
            else {
                errorMessage += error.message + ' 请稍后再试。';
            }

            this.enhancer.summaryPanel.updateContent({
                title: '错误',
                text: errorMessage
            });
        }
    }

    /**
     * 使用 Anthropic 摘要文本
     * @param {string} text - 要摘要的文本
     * @param {string} model - 要使用的模型
     * @param {string} apiKey - API 密钥
     * @param {Map} commentPathToIdMap - 评论路径到 ID 的映射
     */
    async summarizeUsingAnthropic(text, model, apiKey, commentPathToIdMap) {
        // 验证所需参数
        if (!text || !model || !apiKey) {
            console.error('Anthropic 摘要缺少必要参数');
            this.enhancer.summaryPanel.updateContent({
                title: '错误',
                text: '缺少 API 配置'
            });
            return;
        }

        try {
            // 将输入文本限制为 Anthropic 的 40,000 个令牌
            const tokenLimitText = this.splitInputTextAtTokenLimit(text, 40_000);

            // 创建系统和用户提示以获得更好的摘要
            const systemPrompt = this.getSystemMessage();
            const postTitle = this.enhancer.getHNPostTitle();
            const userPrompt = await this.getUserMessage(postTitle, tokenLimitText);

            // Anthropic 在顶层接受系统消息，而用户消息作为具有角色"user"和内容的数组。
            const messages = [{
                role: "user",
                content: userPrompt
            }];

            // 使用后台消息发出 API 请求
            const response = await this.enhancer.sendBackgroundMessage('ANTHROPIC_API_REQUEST', {
                apiKey: apiKey,
                model: model,
                messages: messages
            });

            // 从响应中提取摘要
            if(!response || !response.content || response.content.length === 0) {
                throw new Error(`摘要响应数据为空。`);
            }
            const summary = response.content[0].text;

            if (!summary) {
                throw new Error('API 响应未生成摘要');
            }

            // 使用生成的摘要更新摘要面板
            await this.enhancer.showSummaryInPanel(summary, commentPathToIdMap, response.duration);

        } catch (error) {
            console.error('Anthropic 摘要出错:', error);

            // 使用错误消息更新摘要面板
            let errorMessage = `使用 Anthropic 模型 ${model} 生成摘要时出错。`;
            if (error.message.includes('API key')) {
                errorMessage += '请检查您的 API 密钥配置。';
            } else if (error.message.includes('429')) {
                errorMessage += '超出速率限制。请稍后再试。';
            } else {
                errorMessage += '请稍后再试。';
            }

            this.enhancer.summaryPanel.updateContent({
                title: '错误',
                text: errorMessage
            });
        }
    }

    /**
     * 使用 DeepSeek 摘要文本
     * @param {string} text - 要摘要的文本
     * @param {string} model - 要使用的模型
     * @param {string} apiKey - API 密钥
     * @param {Map} commentPathToIdMap - 评论路径到 ID 的映射
     */
    async summarizeUsingDeepSeek(text, model, apiKey, commentPathToIdMap) {
        // 验证所需参数
        if (!text || !model || !apiKey) {
            console.error('DeepSeek 摘要缺少必要参数');
            this.enhancer.summaryPanel.updateContent({
                title: '错误',
                text: '缺少 API 配置'
            });
            return;
        }

        try {
            // 将输入文本限制为 DeepSeek 的 40,000 个令牌
            const tokenLimitText = this.splitInputTextAtTokenLimit(text, 40_000);

            // 创建系统和用户提示以获得更好的摘要
            const systemPrompt = this.getSystemMessage();
            const postTitle = this.enhancer.getHNPostTitle();
            const userPrompt = await this.getUserMessage(postTitle, tokenLimitText);

            // DeepSeek 采用与 OpenAI 相同格式的系统和用户消息 - 具有角色（系统/用户）和内容的数组
            const messages = [{
                role: "system",
                content: systemPrompt
            }, {
                role: "user",
                content: userPrompt
            }];

            // 使用后台消息发出 API 请求
            const response = await this.enhancer.sendBackgroundMessage('DEEPSEEK_API_REQUEST', {
                apiKey: apiKey,
                model: model,
                messages: messages
            });

            // 从响应中提取摘要
            const summary = response?.choices[0]?.message?.content;
            if (!summary) {
                throw new Error('API 响应未生成摘要');
            }

            // 使用生成的摘要更新摘要面板
            await this.enhancer.showSummaryInPanel(summary, commentPathToIdMap, response.duration);

        } catch (error) {
            console.error('DeepSeek 摘要出错:', error);

            // 使用错误消息更新摘要面板
            let errorMessage = `使用 DeepSeek 模型 ${model} 生成摘要时出错。`;
            if (error.message.includes('API key')) {
                errorMessage += '请检查您的 API 密钥配置。';
            } else if (error.message.includes('429') ) {
                errorMessage += '超出速率限制。请稍后再试。';
            } else if (error.message.includes('current quota')) {
                errorMessage += 'API 配额已超出。请稍后再试。';  // DeepSeek 有每日配额
            }
            else {
                errorMessage += error.message + ' 请稍后再试。';
            }

            this.enhancer.summaryPanel.updateContent({
                title: '错误',
                text: errorMessage
            });
        }
    }

    /**
     * 使用 Ollama 摘要文本
     * @param {string} text - 要摘要的文本
     * @param {string} model - 要使用的模型
     * @param {Map} commentPathToIdMap - 评论路径到 ID 的映射
     */
    async summarizeUsingOllama(text, model, commentPathToIdMap) {
        // 验证所需参数
        if (!text || !model) {
            console.error('Ollama 摘要缺少必要参数');
            this.enhancer.summaryPanel.updateContent({
                title: '错误',
                text: '缺少 API 配置'
            });
            return;
        }

        try {
            // 创建系统消息以获得更好的摘要
            const systemMessage = this.getSystemMessage();

            // 创建带有要摘要文本的用户消息
            const title = this.enhancer.getHNPostTitle();
            const userMessage = await this.getUserMessage(title, text);

            // 使用后台消息发出 API 请求
            const response = await this.enhancer.sendBackgroundMessage('OLLAMA_API_REQUEST', {
                model: model,
                messages: [
                    { role: "system", content: systemMessage },
                    { role: "user", content: userMessage }
                ]
            });

            // 从响应中提取摘要
            const summary = response.message?.content;
            if (!summary) {
                throw new Error('API 响应未生成摘要');
            }

            // 使用生成的摘要更新摘要面板
            await this.enhancer.showSummaryInPanel(summary, commentPathToIdMap, response.duration);

        } catch (error) {
            console.error('Ollama 摘要出错:', error);

            // 使用错误消息更新摘要面板
            let errorMessage = '生成摘要时出错。' + error.message;
            this.enhancer.summaryPanel.updateContent({
                title: '错误',
                text: errorMessage
            });
        }
    }

    /**
     * 使用 Gemini 摘要文本
     * @param {string} text - 要摘要的文本
     * @param {string} model - 要使用的模型
     * @param {Map} commentPathToIdMap - 评论路径到 ID 的映射
     */
    async summarizeUsingGemini(text, model, commentPathToIdMap) {
        // 验证所需参数
        const data = await chrome.storage.sync.get('settings');
        const apiKey = data.settings?.gemini?.apiKey;

        if (!text || !model || !apiKey) {
            console.error('Gemini 摘要缺少必要参数');
            this.enhancer.summaryPanel.updateContent({
                title: '错误',
                text: '缺少 Gemini 的 API 配置'
            });
            return;
        }

        try {
            console.log('开始使用Gemini生成摘要，模型:', model);

            // 在摘要面板中显示加载消息
            this.enhancer.summaryPanel.updateContent({
                title: '线程摘要',
                metadata: `使用 <strong>Gemini ${model}</strong> 分析讨论`,
                text: `<div>生成摘要中... 这可能需要一些时间。<span class="loading-spinner"></span></div>`
            });

            // 限制输入文本以避免令牌限制
            const tokenLimit = model.includes('1.5') ? 30000 : 15000;
            const tokenLimitText = this.splitInputTextAtTokenLimit(text, tokenLimit);
            console.log('文本长度限制为:', tokenLimit, '字符');

            // 创建系统和用户提示
            const systemPrompt = this.getSystemMessage();
            const postTitle = this.enhancer.getHNPostTitle();
            const userPrompt = await this.getUserMessage(postTitle, tokenLimitText);
            console.log('准备发送请求到Gemini API，标题:', postTitle);

            // 使用后台消息发出 API 请求
            console.log('发送GEMINI_API_REQUEST消息到background.js');
            const response = await this.enhancer.sendBackgroundMessage('GEMINI_API_REQUEST', {
                apiKey: apiKey,
                model: model,
                systemPrompt: systemPrompt,
                userPrompt: userPrompt
            });
            console.log('收到Gemini API响应:', response ? '成功' : '失败');

            if (!response) {
                throw new Error('未收到Gemini API响应');
            }

            if (!response.candidates || response.candidates.length === 0) {
                console.error('Gemini API响应中没有candidates:', response);
                throw new Error('Gemini API响应中没有candidates');
            }

            console.log('Gemini API响应结构:', JSON.stringify(response, null, 2));

            if (!response.candidates[0].content || !response.candidates[0].content.parts || !response.candidates[0].content.parts[0]) {
                console.error('Gemini API响应结构不正确:', response.candidates[0]);
                throw new Error('Gemini API响应结构不正确');
            }

            const summary = response.candidates[0].content.parts[0].text;
            console.log('成功获取摘要，长度:', summary ? summary.length : 0);

            // 使用生成的摘要更新摘要面板
            await this.enhancer.showSummaryInPanel(summary, commentPathToIdMap, response.duration);
            console.log('摘要已显示在面板中');

        } catch (error) {
            console.error('Gemini摘要生成错误:', error);
            console.error('错误详情:', error.stack);

            // 使用错误消息更新摘要面板
            let errorMessage = `使用 Gemini 模型 ${model} 生成摘要时出错。`;
            if (error.message.includes('API key')) {
                errorMessage += '请检查您的 API 密钥配置。';
            } else if (error.message.includes('429')) {
                errorMessage += '超出速率限制。请稍后再试。';
            } else {
                errorMessage += error.message;
            }

            this.enhancer.summaryPanel.updateContent({
                title: '错误',
                text: errorMessage
            });
        }
    }
}

export default Summarizer;

/**
 * API 相关功能的辅助类
 */
class APIHelper {
    /**
     * 创建一个新的 APIHelper
     * @param {Object} enhancer - 父 HNEnhancer 实例
     */
    constructor(enhancer) {
        this.enhancer = enhancer;
    }

    /**
     * 发送后台消息
     * @param {string} type - 消息类型
     * @param {Object} data - 消息数据
     * @returns {Promise<Object>} - 响应数据
     */
    async sendBackgroundMessage(type, data) {
        this.enhancer.logDebug(`发送浏览器运行时消息 ${type}:`, data);

        let response;
        const startTime = performance.now();
        let duration = 0;

        try {
            response = await chrome.runtime.sendMessage({type, data});

            const endTime = performance.now();
            duration = Math.round((endTime - startTime) / 1000);

            this.enhancer.logDebug(`从后台消息 '${type}' 获得响应，用时 ${duration}s。URL: ${data.url || 'N/A'}`);

        } catch (error) {
            const endTime = performance.now();
            duration = Math.round((endTime - startTime) / 1000);

            const errorMessage = `发送后台消息 '${type}' 时出错。URL: ${data?.url || 'N/A'}。用时: ${duration}s。错误: ${error.message}`;
            console.error(errorMessage);
            throw new Error(errorMessage);
        }

        if (!response) {
            console.error(`没有收到后台消息 ${type} 的响应`);
            throw new Error(`没有收到后台消息 ${type} 的响应`);
        }
        if (!response.success) {
            console.error(`后台消息 ${type} 的错误响应:`, response.error);
            throw new Error(response.error);
        }

        // 将持续时间添加到响应中，以便在摘要面板中显示
        response.data.duration = duration;
        return response.data;
    }

    /**
     * 获取用户信息
     * @param {string} username - 用户名
     * @returns {Promise<Object>} - 用户信息
     */
    async fetchUserInfo(username) {
        try {
            const data = await this.sendBackgroundMessage(
                'FETCH_API_REQUEST',
                {
                    url: `https://hn.algolia.com/api/v1/users/${username}`,
                    method: 'GET'
                }
            );

            return {
                karma: data.karma || 'Not found',
                about: data.about || 'No about information'
            };
        } catch (error) {
            return {
                karma: 'User info error',
                about: 'No about information'
            };
        }
    }

    /**
     * 从 API 获取 HN 评论
     * @param {string} itemId - 项目 ID
     * @returns {Promise<Object>} - 评论数据
     */
    async fetchHNCommentsFromAPI(itemId) {
        const commentsJson = await this.sendBackgroundMessage(
            'FETCH_API_REQUEST',
            {
                url: `https://hn.algolia.com/api/v1/items/${itemId}`,
                method: 'GET'
            }
        );
        return commentsJson;
    }

    /**
     * 获取 AI 提供商和模型
     * @returns {Promise<Object>} - AI 提供商和模型
     */
    async getAIProviderModel() {
        const settingsData = await chrome.storage.sync.get('settings');
        const aiProvider = settingsData.settings?.providerSelection;
        const model = settingsData.settings?.[aiProvider]?.model;
        const language = settingsData.settings?.language || 'en';
        return {aiProvider, model, language};
    }

    /**
     * 打开选项页面
     */
    openOptionsPage() {
        chrome.runtime.sendMessage({
            type: 'HN_SHOW_OPTIONS',
            data: {}
        }).catch(error => {
            console.error('发送显示选项消息时出错:', error);
        });
    }
}

export default APIHelper;

/**

class CommentsProcessor {
    /**
     * 创建一个新的 CommentsProcessor
     * @param {Object} enhancer - 父 HNEnhancer 实例
     */
    constructor(enhancer) {
        this.enhancer = enhancer;
    }

    /**
     * 获取当前 HN 项目 ID
     * @returns {string|null} - 项目 ID 或未找到时为 null
     */
    getCurrentHNItemId() {
        const itemIdMatch = window.location.search.match(/id=(\d+)/);
        return itemIdMatch ? itemIdMatch[1] : null;
    }

# Refactoring Plan for HN Companion Extension

## Goal
Refactor the large content.js file into smaller, more maintainable modules following good software engineering practices.

## Current Issues
- content.js is too large (3000+ lines)
- Code has multiple responsibilities mixed together
- Hard to maintain and extend

## Refactoring Strategy
We'll use a modular approach, breaking down the code into logical components:

1. Core functionality (HNEnhancer class)
2. Navigation modules (home page, comments page)
3. Summary functionality
4. AI provider integrations
5. UI components
6. Utility functions

## Folder Structure
```
src/
├── core/
│   ├── hn-enhancer.js       # Main class, initialization
│   ├── hn-state.js          # State management
│   └── constants.js         # Constants and enums
├── navigation/
│   ├── home-navigation.js   # Home page navigation
│   ├── comment-navigation.js # Comment page navigation
│   └── keyboard-shortcuts.js # Keyboard handling
├── summary/
│   ├── summary-manager.js   # Summary orchestration
│   ├── thread-analyzer.js   # Thread analysis
│   └── comment-formatter.js # Comment formatting
├── ai/
│   ├── ai-provider.js       # Base provider class
│   ├── openai-provider.js   # OpenAI implementation
│   ├── anthropic-provider.js # Anthropic implementation
│   ├── ollama-provider.js   # Ollama implementation
│   └── chrome-ai-provider.js # Chrome AI implementation
├── ui/
│   ├── help-modal.js        # Help modal component
│   ├── author-popup.js      # Author popup component
│   └── summary-panel.js     # Summary panel (already separate)
└── utils/
    ├── api-utils.js         # API communication
    ├── dom-utils.js         # DOM manipulation
    └── markdown-utils.js    # Markdown conversion
```

### Phase 1: Initial Setup and Core Structure

- [ ] Create folder structure

<<<<<<< SEARCH

/**
 * HNState - Manages state persistence for Hacker News Companion
 * Handles saving and retrieving the last seen post ID
 */
export class HNState {
    /**
     * Save the last seen post ID to local storage
     * @param {string} postId - The ID of the post to save
     */
    static saveLastSeenPostId(postId) {
        chrome.storage.local.set({
            lastSeenPost: {
                id: postId,
                timestamp: Date.now()
            }
        }).catch(_ => {
            // console.error('Error saving current post state:', _);
        });
    }

    /**
     * Get the last seen post ID from local storage
     * @returns {Promise<string|null>} The last seen post ID or null if not found or expired
     */
    static async getLastSeenPostId() {
        try {
            const data = await chrome.storage.local.get('lastSeenPost');
            // Return null if no state or if state is older than 15 minutes
            if (!data.lastSeenPost || Date.now() - data.lastSeenPost.timestamp > (15 * 60 * 1000)) {
                await this.clearLastSeenPost();
                return null;
            }
            return data.lastSeenPost.id;
        } catch (error) {
            // console.error('Error retrieving saved post state:', error);
            return null;
        }
    }

    /**
     * Clear the last seen post ID from local storage
     */
    static async clearLastSeenPost() {
        chrome.storage.local.remove('lastSeenPost').catch(_ => {
            // console.error('Error clearing lastSeenPost post state:', _);
        });
    }
}

import { HNState } from './hn-state.js';
import { SummarizeCheckStatus, CHROME_AI_AVAILABLE, DEBUG } from './constants.js';

/**
 * Main class for the Hacker News Companion extension
 * Orchestrates all functionality and manages the lifecycle
 */
export class HNEnhancer {
    /**
     * Initialize the HN Companion extension
     */
    constructor() {
        this.logDebug('Initializing HN Companion...');
        
        // Initialize state
        this.authorComments = this.createAuthorCommentsMap();
        this.popup = this.createAuthorPopup();
        this.postAuthor = this.getPostAuthor();
        this.currentComment = null;
        this.helpModal = this.createHelpModal();
        
        // Create UI elements
        this.createHelpIcon();

        // Initialize page-specific functionality
        if (this.isHomePage) {
            this.currentPostIndex = -1;
            this.allPosts = null;
            this.initHomePageNavigation();
        } else if (this.isCommentsPage) {
            this.initCommentsPageNavigation();
            this.navigateToFirstComment(false);
            this.initChromeBuiltinAI();
            this.summaryPanel = new SummaryPanel();
        }

        // Set up keyboard shortcuts
        this.setupKeyBoardShortcuts();
        
        this.logDebug('HN Companion initialized');
    }

    /**
     * Log debug messages if debug mode is enabled
     * @param {...any} args - Arguments to log
     */
    logDebug(...args) {
        if (DEBUG) {
            console.log('[DEBUG] ', ...args);
        }
    }

    /**
     * Log informational messages
     * @param {...any} args - Arguments to log
     */
    logInfo(...args) {
        console.log('[INFO] ', ...args);
    }

    /**
     * Check if current page is a home page (main listing)
     * @returns {boolean} True if current page is a home page
     */
    get isHomePage() {
        const pathname = window.location.pathname;
        return pathname === '/' || 
               pathname === '/news' || 
               pathname === '/newest' || 
               pathname === '/ask' || 
               pathname === '/show' || 
               pathname === '/front' || 
               pathname === '/shownew';
    }

    /**
     * Check if current page is a comments page
     * @returns {boolean} True if current page is a comments page
     */
    get isCommentsPage() {
        return window.location.pathname === '/item';
    }

    // Placeholder methods to be implemented or moved to separate modules
    createAuthorCommentsMap() { /* To be implemented */ }
    createAuthorPopup() { /* To be implemented */ }
    getPostAuthor() { /* To be implemented */ }
    createHelpModal() { /* To be implemented */ }
    createHelpIcon() { /* To be implemented */ }
    initHomePageNavigation() { /* To be implemented */ }
    initCommentsPageNavigation() { /* To be implemented */ }
    navigateToFirstComment() { /* To be implemented */ }
    initChromeBuiltinAI() { /* To be implemented */ }
    setupKeyBoardShortcuts() { /* To be implemented */ }
}

// Initialize the HNEnhancer when the document is ready
document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', () => {
    document.hnEnhancer = new HNEnhancer();
});

## Goal
Refactor the large content.js file into smaller, more maintainable modules following good software engineering practices.

- content.js is too large (3000+ lines)

import { HNState } from '../core/hn-state.js';

/**
 * Handles navigation on the Hacker News home pages
 */
export class HomeNavigation {
    /**
     * Initialize home page navigation
     * @param {HNEnhancer} enhancer - The parent HNEnhancer instance
     */
    constructor(enhancer) {
        this.enhancer = enhancer;
        this.allPosts = null;
        this.currentPostIndex = -1;
        
        this.init();
    }
    
    /**
     * Initialize home page navigation
     */
    init() {
        this.allPosts = document.querySelectorAll('.athing');
        
        // Check if there is a post id saved in storage - if yes, restore it; else navigate to the first post
        HNState.getLastSeenPostId().then(lastSeenPostId => {
            let lastSeenPostIndex = -1;
            if (lastSeenPostId) {
                this.enhancer.logDebug(`Got last seen post id from storage: ${lastSeenPostId}`);

                // Find the post with matching ID
                const posts = Array.from(this.allPosts);
                lastSeenPostIndex = posts.findIndex(post => this.getPostId(post) === lastSeenPostId);
            }

            // If we got a valid last seen post, set it as the current index, else go to the first post
            if (lastSeenPostIndex !== -1) {
                this.setCurrentPostIndex(lastSeenPostIndex);
            } else {
                this.navigateToPost('first');
            }
        });
    }
    
    /**
     * Get the ID of a post
     * @param {Element} post - The post element
     * @returns {string|null} The post ID or null if not found
     */
    getPostId(post) {
        // Extract post ID from the comments link
        const subtext = post.nextElementSibling;
        if (subtext) {
            const commentsLink = subtext.querySelector('a[href^="item?id="]');
            if (

<<<<<<< SEARCH
=======
# Refactoring Plan for HN Companion Extension

## Goal
Refactor the large content.js file into smaller, more maintainable modules with clear separation of concerns.

## Current Issues
- content.js is too large (2000+ lines)
- Mixed responsibilities (UI, API calls, summarization, navigation)
- Hard to maintain and extend

## Refactoring Strategy
We'll use a modular approach, breaking down the code into logical components:

1. Core functionality (HNEnhancer class)
2. Navigation modules (home page, comments page)
3. Summarization services (different AI providers)
4. UI components (panels, modals, popups)
5. Utility functions

## Directory Structure
```
src/
├── core/
│   ├── hn-enhancer.js       # Main class, initialization
│   ├── hn-state.js          # State management
│   └── constants.js         # Constants and enums
├── navigation/
│   ├── home-navigation.js   # Home page navigation
│   ├── comment-navigation.js # Comment page navigation
│   └── keyboard-shortcuts.js # Keyboard handling
├── summarization/
│   ├── summarization-service.js # Base summarization logic
│   ├── providers/
│   │   ├── openai-provider.js
│   │   ├── anthropic-provider.js
│   │   ├── ollama-provider.js
│   │   ├── chrome-ai-provider.js
│   │   ├── gemini-provider.js
│   │   ├── deepseek-provider.js
│   │   └── openrouter-provider.js
│   └── prompt-templates.js  # System and user prompts
├── ui/
│   ├── summary-panel.js     # Summary panel UI
│   ├── help-modal.js        # Help modal UI
│   ├── author-popup.js      # Author popup UI
│   └── ui-utils.js          # UI utility functions
└── utils/
    ├── api-utils.js         # API communication
    ├── dom-utils.js         # DOM manipulation
    ├── text-utils.js        # Text processing
    └── markdown-utils.js    # Markdown conversion
```

## Todo List (in order)

### Phase 1: Setup and Core Structure
1. Create directory structure
2. Extract HNState class to its own file
3. Create constants.js for enums and constants
4. Create base HNEnhancer class with minimal initialization

### Phase 2: Extract Navigation Logic
5. Extract home page navigation to home-navigation.js
6. Extract comment page navigation to comment-navigation.js
7. Extract keyboard shortcuts handling to keyboard-shortcuts.js

### Phase 3: Extract UI Components
8. Move SummaryPanel to its own file (already done)
9. Extract help modal to help-modal.js
10. Extract author popup to author-popup.js
11. Create UI utilities in ui-utils.js

### Phase 4: Extract Summarization Logic
12. Create base summarization service
13. Extract each provider to its own file
14. Move prompt templates to prompt-templates.js

### Phase 5: Extract Utilities
15. Create API utilities for background communication
16. Create DOM utilities for common DOM operations
17. Create text utilities for text processing
18. Create markdown utilities for markdown conversion

### Phase 6: Integration and Testing
19. Update imports/exports in all files
20. Update content.js to use the new modules
21. Test all functionality
22. Fix any issues

## How to Use This Memo

This memo serves as a guide for refactoring across multiple sessions. In each session:

1. Check this memo to see what task to work on next
2. Complete one or more tasks from the todo list
3. Update this memo with progress and any new insights
4. Mark completed tasks and add any new tasks discovered

When starting a new session:
1. Review this memo to understand the current state
2. Continue from where the previous session left off
3. Focus on one component at a time for clean implementation

## Progress Tracking

- [ ] Phase 1: Setup and Core Structure
- [ ] Phase 2: Extract Navigation Logic
- [ ] Phase 3: Extract UI Components
- [ ] Phase 4: Extract Summarization Logic
- [ ] Phase 5: Extract Utilities
- [ ] Phase 6: Integration and Testing

## Notes
- Keep backward compatibility during refactoring
- Maintain the same functionality while improving code structure
- Test each component after extraction
- Update this memo with any challenges or design decisions

class HNState {
    static saveLastSeenPostId(postId) {
        chrome.storage.local.set({
            lastSeenPost: {
                id: postId,
                timestamp: Date.now()
            }
        }).catch(_ => {
            // console.error('Error saving current post state:', _);
        });
    }

    static async getLastSeenPostId() {
        try {
            const data = await chrome.storage.local.get('lastSeenPost');
            // Return null if no state or if state is older than 15 minutes
            if (!data.lastSeenPost || Date.now() - data.lastSeenPost.timestamp > (15 * 60 * 1000)) {
                await this.clearLastSeenPost();
                return null;
            }
            return data.lastSeenPost.id;
        } catch (error) {
            // console.error('Error retrieving saved post state:', error);
            return null;
        }
    }

    static async clearLastSeenPost() {
        chrome.storage.local.remove('lastSeenPost').catch(_ => {
            // console.error('Error clearing lastSeenPost post state:', _);
        });
    }
}

export default HNState;

# Refactoring Plan for HN Companion Extension

## Goal
Refactor the large content.js file into smaller, more maintainable modules with clear separation of concerns.

## Current Issues
- content.js is too large (2000+ lines)
- Mixed responsibilities (UI, API calls, summarization, navigation)
- Hard to maintain and extend

## Refactoring Strategy
We'll use a modular approach, breaking down the code into logical components:

1. Core functionality (HNEnhancer class)
2. Navigation modules (home page, comments page)
3. Summarization services (different AI providers)
4. UI components (panels, modals, popups)
5. Utility functions

## Directory Structure
```
src/
├── core/
│   ├── hn-enhancer.js       # Main class, initialization
│   ├── hn-state.js          # State management
│   └── constants.js         # Constants and enums
├── navigation/
│   ├── home-navigation.js   # Home page navigation
│   ├── comment-navigation.js # Comment page navigation
│   └── keyboard-shortcuts.js # Keyboard handling
├── summarization/
│   ├── summarization-service.js # Base summarization logic
│   ├── providers/
│   │   ├── openai-provider.js
│   │   ├── anthropic-provider.js
│   │   ├── ollama-provider.js
│   │   ├── chrome-ai-provider.js
│   │   ├── gemini-provider.js
│   │   ├── deepseek-provider.js
│   │   └── openrouter-provider.js
│   └── prompt-templates.js  # System and user prompts
├── ui/
│   ├── summary-panel.js     # Summary panel UI
│   ├── help-modal.js        # Help modal UI
│   ├── author-popup.js      # Author popup UI
│   └── ui-utils.js          # UI utility functions
└── utils/
    ├── api-utils.js         # API communication
    ├── dom-utils.js         # DOM manipulation
    ├── text-utils.js        # Text processing
    └── markdown-utils.js    # Markdown conversion
```

## Todo List (in order)

### Phase 1: Setup and Core Structure
1. Create directory structure
2. Extract HNState class to its own file
3. Create constants.js for enums and constants
4. Create base HNEnhancer class with minimal initialization

### Phase 2: Extract Navigation Logic
5. Extract home page navigation to home-navigation.js
6. Extract comment page navigation to comment-navigation.js
7. Extract keyboard shortcuts handling to keyboard-shortcuts.js

### Phase 3: Extract UI Components
8. Move SummaryPanel to its own file (already done)
9. Extract help modal to help-modal.js
10. Extract author popup to author-popup.js
11. Create UI utilities in ui-utils.js

### Phase 4: Extract Summarization Logic
12. Create base summarization service
13. Extract each provider to its own file
14. Move prompt templates to prompt-templates.js

### Phase 5: Extract Utilities
15. Create API utilities for background communication
16. Create DOM utilities for common DOM operations
17. Create text utilities for text processing
18. Create markdown utilities for markdown conversion

### Phase 6: Integration and Testing
19. Update imports/exports in all files
20. Update content.js to use the new modules
21. Test all functionality
22. Fix any issues

## How to Use This Memo

This memo serves as a guide for refactoring across multiple sessions. In each session:

1. Check this memo to see what task to work on next
2. Complete one or more tasks from the todo list
3. Update this memo with progress and any new insights
4. Mark completed tasks and add any new tasks discovered

When starting a new session:
1. Review this memo to understand the current state
2. Continue from where the previous session left off
3. Focus on one component at a time for clean implementation

- [ ] Phase 2: Extract Navigation Logic
- [ ] Phase 3: Extract UI Components
- [ ] Phase 4: Extract Summarization Logic
- [ ] Phase 5: Extract Utilities
- [ ] Phase 6: Integration and Testing

- Keep backward compatibility during refactoring
- Maintain the same functionality while improving code structure
- Test each component after extraction
- Update this memo with any challenges or design decisions

import HNState from './hn-state.js';
import { DEBUG, CHROME_AI_AVAILABLE } from './constants.js';

class HNEnhancer {
    constructor() {
        this.DEBUG = DEBUG;
        this.isChomeAiAvailable = CHROME_AI_AVAILABLE.NO;
        
        // Initialize the page based on type - home page vs. comments page
        if (this.isHomePage) {
            this.initHomePageNavigation();
        } else if (this.isCommentsPage) {
            this.initCommentsPageNavigation();
        }
        
        // Set up keyboard shortcuts
        this.setupKeyBoardShortcuts();
    }

    get isHomePage() {
        const pathname = window.location.pathname;
        return pathname === '/' || pathname === '/news' || pathname === '/newest' || 
               pathname === '/ask' || pathname === '/show' || pathname === '/front' || 
               pathname === '/shownew';
    }

    get isCommentsPage() {
        return window.location.pathname === '/item';
    }

    logDebug(...args) {
        if (this.DEBUG) {
            console.log('[DEBUG] ', ...args);
        }
    }

    logInfo(...args) {
        console.log('[INFO] ', ...args);
    }

    // Placeholder methods to be implemented or moved to separate modules
    initHomePageNavigation() {
        // Will be implemented in home-navigation.js
        console.log('Home page navigation initialized');
    }

    initCommentsPageNavigation() {
        // Will be implemented in comment-navigation.js
        console.log('Comments page navigation initialized');
    }

    setupKeyBoardShortcuts() {
        // Will be implemented in keyboard-shortcuts.js
        console.log('Keyboard shortcuts initialized');
    }
}

export default HNEnhancer;

# Refactoring Plan for HN Companion Extension

## Goal
Refactor the large content.js file into smaller, more maintainable modules with clear separation of concerns.

## Current Issues
- content.js is too large (over 2000 lines)
- Mixed responsibilities (UI, API calls, navigation, summarization)
- Hard to maintain and extend

## Refactoring Strategy
Break down content.js into logical modules following a more organized structure:

### Proposed Module Structure
1. **Core/Base Modules**
   - `hn-enhancer.js` - Main class, initialization and coordination
   - `hn-state.js` - State management (already partially separated)

2. **Feature Modules**
   - `navigation.js` - Keyboard navigation, post/comment navigation
   - `summarization.js` - AI summarization logic
   - `author-tracking.js` - Author comments tracking and navigation

3. **UI Modules**
   - `ui-components.js` - UI elements creation (help modal, popups)
   - `summary-panel.js` - Already separated

4. **Utility Modules**
   - `api-client.js` - API communication
   - `markdown-utils.js` - Markdown conversion
   - `dom-utils.js` - DOM manipulation helpers

## Todo List (in order)

### Phase 1: Initial Setup
- [x] Create memo.md for tracking progress
- [ ] Create basic module structure and files
- [ ] Set up module imports/exports

### Phase 2: Extract Core Functionality
- [ ] Extract HNState class to hn-state.js
- [ ] Create minimal HNEnhancer class in hn-enhancer.js
- [ ] Set up initialization flow

### Phase 3: Extract Feature Modules
- [ ] Move navigation code to navigation.js
- [ ] Move summarization code to summarization.js
- [ ] Move author tracking to author-tracking.js

### Phase 4: Extract UI Components
- [ ] Move UI creation code to ui-components.js
- [ ] Ensure summary-panel.js integration

### Phase 5: Extract Utilities
- [ ] Move API communication to api-client.js
- [ ] Move markdown utilities to markdown-utils.js
- [ ] Move DOM utilities to dom-utils.js

### Phase 6: Testing & Refinement
- [ ] Test all features after refactoring
- [ ] Fix any integration issues
- [ ] Optimize imports

## How to Use This Memo

This memo serves as a persistent record of the refactoring plan and progress. In each session:

1. **Start each session by reviewing this memo**
   - Check what's been completed
   - Identify the next task

2. **Update the memo after each task**
   - Mark completed tasks with [x]
   - Add any new insights or challenges
   - Document any design decisions

3. **Focus on one task at a time**
   - Complete a single logical unit of work
   - Test thoroughly before moving on
   - Update this memo before ending the session

4. **Maintain backward compatibility**
   - Ensure the extension works at each step
   - Don't break existing functionality

This approach allows for incremental progress across multiple sessions, even with context limitations.

=======
/**
 * Manages state persistence for the Hacker News Companion extension
 */
class HNState {
    /**
     * Saves the last seen post ID to local storage
     * @param {string} postId - The ID of the post to save
     */
    static saveLastSeenPostId(postId) {
        chrome.storage.local.set({
            lastSeenPost: {
                id: postId,
                timestamp: Date.now()
            }
        }).catch(_ => {
            // console.error('Error saving current post state:', _);
        });
    }

    /**
     * Retrieves the last seen post ID from local storage
     * @returns {Promise<string|null>} The last seen post ID or null if not found or expired
     */
    static async getLastSeenPostId() {
        try {
            const data = await chrome.storage.local.get('lastSeenPost');
            // Return null if no state or if state is older than 15 minutes
            if (!data.lastSeenPost || Date.now() - data.lastSeenPost.timestamp > (15 * 60 * 1000)) {
                await this.clearLastSeenPost();
                return null;
            }
            return data.lastSeenPost.id;
        } catch (error) {
            // console.error('Error retrieving saved post state:', error);
            return null;
        }
    }

    /**
     * Clears the last seen post from local storage
     */
    static async clearLastSeenPost() {
        chrome.storage.local.remove('lastSeenPost').catch(_ => {
            // console.error('Error clearing lastSeenPost post state:', _);
        });
    }
}

export default HNState;
>>>>>>> REPLACE
```

2. Now, let's create the api-client.js module for handling API communication:

<<<<<<< SEARCH
=======
/**
 * Handles API communication for the Hacker News Companion extension
 */
class ApiClient {
    constructor(debug = false) {
        this.debug = debug;
    }

    /**
     * Logs debug messages if debug mode is enabled
     * @param {...any} args - Arguments to log
     */
    logDebug(...args) {
        if (this.debug) {
            console.log('[DEBUG] ', ...args);
        }
    }

    /**
     * Logs info messages
     * @param {...any} args - Arguments to log
     */
    logInfo(...args) {
        console.log('[INFO] ', ...args);
    }

    /**
     * Sends a message to the background script and handles the response
     * @param {string} type - The type of message to send
     * @param {Object} data - The data to send with the message
     * @returns {Promise<any>} The response data
     */
    async sendBackgroundMessage(type, data) {
        this.logDebug(`Sending browser runtime message ${type}:`, data);

        let response;
        const startTime = performance.now();
        let duration = 0;

        try {
            response = await chrome.runtime.sendMessage({type, data});

            const endTime = performance.now();
            duration = Math.round((endTime - startTime) / 1000);

            this.logDebug(`Got response from background message '${type}' in ${duration}s. URL: ${data.url || 'N/A'}`);

        } catch (error) {
            const endTime = performance.now();
            duration = Math.round((endTime - startTime) / 1000);

            const errorMessage = `Error sending background message '${type}' URL: ${data?.url || 'N/A'}. Duration: ${duration}s. Error: ${error.message}`;
            console.error(errorMessage);
            throw new Error(errorMessage);
        }

        if (!response) {
            console.error(`No response from background message ${type}`);
            throw new Error(`No response from background message ${type}`);
        }
        if (!response.success) {
            console.error(`Error response from background message ${type}:`, response.error);
            throw new Error(response.error);
        }

        // Add the duration to the response for displaying in the summary panel
        response.data.duration = duration;
        return response.data;
    }

    /**
     * Fetches user information from the Hacker News Algolia API
     * @param {string} username - The username to fetch information for
     * @returns {Promise<Object>} The user information
     */
    async fetchUserInfo(username) {
        try {
            const data = await this.sendBackgroundMessage(
                'FETCH_API_REQUEST',
                {
                    url: `https://hn.algolia.com/api/v1/users/${username}`,
                    method: 'GET'
                }
            );

            return {
                karma: data.karma || 'Not found',
                about: data.about || 'No about information'
            };
        } catch (error) {
            return {
                karma: 'User info error',
                about: 'No about information'
            };
        }
    }

    /**
     * Fetches comments for a post from the Hacker News Algolia API
     * @param {string} itemId - The ID of the post to fetch comments for
     * @returns {Promise<Object>} The comments data
     */
    async fetchHNCommentsFromAPI(itemId) {
        return await this.sendBackgroundMessage(
            'FETCH_API_REQUEST',
            {
                url: `https://hn.algolia.com/api/v1/items/${itemId}`,
                method: 'GET'
            }
        );
    }
}

export default ApiClient;
>>>>>>> REPLACE
```

<<<<<<< SEARCH
=======
/**
 * Utility functions for handling markdown conversion
 */
class MarkdownUtils {
    /**
     * Converts markdown text to HTML
     * @param {string} markdown - The markdown text to convert
     * @returns {string} The converted HTML
     */
    static convertMarkdownToHTML(markdown) {
        // Helper function to wrap all lists as unordered lists
        function wrapLists(html) {
            // Wrap any sequence of list items in ul tags
            return html.replace(/<li>(?:[^<]|<(?!\/li>))*<\/li>(?:\s*<li>(?:[^<]|<(?!\/li>))*<\/li>)*/g,
                match => `<ul>${match}</ul>`);
        }

        // First escape HTML special characters
        let html = markdown
            .replace(/&/g, '&amp;')
            .replace(/</g, '&lt;')
            .replace(/>/g, '&gt;');

        // Convert markdown to HTML
        // noinspection RegExpRedundantEscape,HtmlUnknownTarget
        html = html
            // Headers
            .replace(/^##### (.*$)/gim, '<h5>$1</h5>')
            .replace(/^#### (.*$)/gim, '<h4>$1</h4>')
            .replace(/^### (.*$)/gim, '<h3>$1</h3>')
            .replace(/^## (.*$)/gim, '<h2>$1</h2>')
            .replace(/^# (.*$)/gim, '<h1>$1</h1>')

            // Blockquotes
            .replace(/^\> (.*$)/gim, '<blockquote>$1</blockquote>')

            // Code blocks and inline code
            .replace(/```([^`]+)```/g, '<pre><code>$1</code></pre>')
            .replace(/`([^`]+)`/g, '<code>$1</code>')

            //  both bullet points and numbered lists to li elements
            .replace(/^\s*[\-\*]\s(.+)/gim, '<li>$1</li>')
            .replace(/^\s*(\d+)\.\s(.+)/gim, '<li>$2</li>')

            // Bold and Italic
            .replace(/\*\*(?=\S)([^\*]+?\S)\*\*/g, '<strong>$1</strong>')
            .replace(/\*(?=\S)([^\*]+?\S)\*/g, '<em>$1</em>')
            .replace(/_(?=\S)([^\*]+?\S)_/g, '<em>$1</em>')

            // Images and links
            .replace(/!\[(.*?)\]\((.*?)\)/gim, "<img alt='$1' src='$2' />")
            .replace(/\[(.*?)\]\((.*?)\)/gim, "<a href='$2'>$1</a>")

            // Horizontal rules
            .replace(/^\s*[\*\-_]{3,}\s*$/gm, '<hr>')

            // Paragraphs and line breaks
            .replace(/\n\s*\n/g, '</p><p>')
        // .replace(/\n/g, '<br />');

        // Wrap all lists as unordered lists
        html = wrapLists(html);

        // Wrap everything in paragraphs if not already wrapped
        if (!html.startsWith('<')) {
            html = `<p>${html}</p>`;
        }

        return html.trim();
    }

    /**
     * Strips anchor tags from text
     * @param {string} text - The text to strip anchors from
     * @returns {string} The text without anchor tags
     */
    static stripAnchors(text) {
        // Use a regular expression to match <a> tags and their contents
        const anchorRegex = /<a\b[^>]*>.*?<\/a>/g;

        // Replace all matches with an empty string
        return text.replace(anchorRegex, '');
    }

    /**
     * Replaces path identifiers with comment links
     * @param {string} text - The text to replace paths in
     * @param {Map<string, string>} commentPathToIdMap - Map of comment paths to IDs
     * @returns {string} The text with paths replaced with links
     */
    static replacePathsWithCommentLinks(text, commentPathToIdMap) {
        // Regular expression to match bracketed numbers with dots
        // Matches patterns like [1], [1.1], [1.1.2], etc.
        const pathRegex = /\[(\d+(?:\.\d+)*)]/g;

        // Replace each match with an HTML link
        return text.replace(pathRegex, (match, path) => {
            const id = commentPathToIdMap.get(path);
            if (!id) {
                return match; // If no ID found, return original text
            }
            return ` <a href="#"
                       title="Go to comment #${id}"
                       data-comment-link="true" data-comment-id="${id}"
                       style="color: rgb(130, 130, 130); text-decoration: underline;"
                    >comment #${id}</a>`;
        });
    }
}

export default MarkdownUtils;
>>>>>>> REPLACE

```javascript
<<<<<<< SEARCH
=======
/**
 * Utility functions for DOM manipulation
 */
class DomUtils {
    /**
     * Gets the post ID from a post element
     * @param {Element} post - The post element
     * @returns {string|null} The post ID or null if not found
     */
    static getPostId(post) {
        // Extract post ID from the comments link
        const subtext = post.nextElementSibling;
        if (subtext) {
            const commentsLink = subtext.querySelector('a[href^="item?id="]');
            if (commentsLink) {
                const match = commentsLink.href.match(/id=(\d+)/);
                return match ? match[1] : null;
            }
        }
        return null;
    }

    /**
     * Gets the current HN item ID from the URL
     * @returns {string|null} The item ID or null if not found
     */
    static getCurrentHNItemId() {
        const itemIdMatch = window.location.search.match(/id=(\d+)/);
        return itemIdMatch ? itemIdMatch[1] : null;
    }

    /**
     * Gets the HN post title from the document title
     * @returns {string} The post title
     */
    static getHNPostTitle() {
        return document.title;
    }

    /**
     * Gets the downvote count from a comment text div
     * @param {Element} commentTextDiv - The comment text div element
     * @returns {number} The downvote count
     */
    static getDownvoteCount(commentTextDiv) {
        // Downvotes are represented by the color of the text. The color is a class name like 'c5a', 'c73', etc.
        const downvotePattern = /c[0-9a-f]{2}/;

        // Find the first class that matches the downvote pattern
        const downvoteClass = [...commentTextDiv.classList.values()]
            .find(className => downvotePattern.test(className.toLowerCase()))
            ?.toLowerCase();

        if (!downvoteClass) {
            return 0;
        }

        const downvoteMap = {
            'c00': 0,
            'c5a': 1,
            'c73': 2,
            'c82': 3,
            'c88': 4,
            'c9c': 5,
            'cae': 6,
            'cbe': 7,
            'cce': 8,
            'cdd': 9
        };
        return downvoteMap[downvoteClass] || 0;
    }
}

export default DomUtils;

const SummarizeCheckStatus = {
    OK: 'ok',
    TEXT_TOO_SHORT: 'too_short',
    THREAD_TOO_SHALLOW: 'too_shallow',
    THREAD_TOO_DEEP: 'chrome_depth_limit'
};

class HNState {
    static saveLastSeenPostId(postId) {
        chrome.storage.local.set({
            lastSeenPost: {
                id: postId,
                timestamp: Date.now()
            }
        }).catch(_ => {
            // console.error('Error saving current post state:', _);
        });
    }

    static async getLastSeenPostId() {
        try {
            const data = await chrome.storage.local.get('lastSeenPost');
            // Return null if no state or if state is older than 15 minutes
            if (!data.lastSeenPost || Date.now() - data.lastSeenPost.timestamp > (15 * 60 * 1000)) {
                await this.clearLastSeenPost();
                return null;
            }
            return data.lastSeenPost.id;
        } catch (error) {
            // console.error('Error retrieving saved post state:', error);
            return null;
        }
    }

    static async clearLastSeenPost() {
        chrome.storage.local.remove('lastSeenPost').catch(_ => {
            // console.error('Error clearing lastSeenPost post state:', _);
        });
    }
}

<<<<<<< SEARCH
# Refactoring Plan for HN Companion Extension

## Goal
Refactor the large content.js file into smaller, more maintainable modules with clear separation of concerns.

## Current Issues
- content.js is too large (over 2000 lines)
- Mixed responsibilities (UI, API calls, navigation, summarization)
- Hard to maintain and extend

## Refactoring Strategy
Break down content.js into logical modules following a more organized structure:

### Proposed Module Structure
1. **Core/Base Modules**
   - `hn-enhancer.js` - Main class, initialization and coordination
   - `hn-state.js` - State management (already partially separated)

2. **Feature Modules**
   - `navigation.js` - Keyboard navigation, post/comment navigation
   - `summarization.js` - AI summarization logic
   - `author-tracking.js` - Author comments tracking and navigation

3. **UI Modules**
   - `ui-components.js` - UI elements creation (help modal, popups)
   - `summary-panel.js` - Already separated

4. **Utility Modules**
   - `api-client.js` - API communication
   - `markdown-utils.js` - Markdown conversion
   - `dom-utils.js` - DOM manipulation helpers

## Todo List (in order)

### Phase 1: Initial Setup
- [x] Create memo.md for tracking progress
- [ ] Create basic module structure and files
- [ ] Set up module imports/exports

### Phase 2: Extract Core Functionality
- [ ] Extract HNState class to hn-state.js
- [ ] Create minimal HNEnhancer class in hn-enhancer.js
- [ ] Set up initialization flow

### Phase 3: Extract Feature Modules
- [ ] Move navigation code to navigation.js
- [ ] Move summarization code to summarization.js
- [ ] Move author tracking to author-tracking.js

### Phase 4: Extract UI Components
- [ ] Move UI creation code to ui-components.js
- [ ] Ensure summary-panel.js integration

### Phase 5: Extract Utilities
- [ ] Move API communication to api-client.js
- [ ] Move markdown utilities to markdown-utils.js
- [ ] Move DOM utilities to dom-utils.js

### Phase 6: Testing & Refinement
- [ ] Test all features after refactoring
- [ ] Fix any integration issues
- [ ] Optimize imports

## How to Use This Memo

This memo serves as a persistent record of the refactoring plan and progress. In each session:

1. **Start each session by reviewing this memo**
   - Check what's been completed
   - Identify the next task

2. **Update the memo after each task**
   - Mark completed tasks with [x]
   - Add any new insights or challenges
   - Document any design decisions

3. **Focus on one task at a time**
   - Complete a single logical unit of work
   - Test thoroughly before moving on
   - Update this memo before ending the session

4. **Maintain backward compatibility**
   - Ensure the extension works at each step
   - Don't break existing functionality

This approach allows for incremental progress across multiple sessions, even with context limitations.

<<<<<<< SEARCH
=======
/**
 * Main class for the Hacker News Companion extension
 * Coordinates all functionality and initializes components
 */
import HNState from './hn-state.js';
import ApiClient from './api-client.js';
import MarkdownUtils from './markdown-utils.js';
import DomUtils from './dom-utils.js';
import SummaryPanel from './summary-panel.js';

export default class HNEnhancer {
    static DEBUG = false;  // Set to true when debugging
    
    static CHROME_AI_AVAILABLE = {
        YES: 'readily',
        NO: 'no',
        AFTER_DOWNLOAD: 'after-download'
    }

    /**
     * Creates a new HNEnhancer instance
     */
    constructor() {
        this.apiClient = new ApiClient(HNEnhancer.DEBUG);
        this.isChomeAiAvailable = HNEnhancer.CHROME_AI_AVAILABLE.NO;
        
        // Initialize page state
        this.authorComments = this.createAuthorCommentsMap();
        this.popup = this.createAuthorPopup();
        this.postAuthor = this.getPostAuthor();
        this.currentComment = null;
        this.helpModal = this.createHelpModal();
        
        this.createHelpIcon();

        // Initialize based on page type
        if (this.isHomePage) {
            this.currentPostIndex = -1;
            this.allPosts = null;
            this.initHomePageNavigation();
        } else if (this.isCommentsPage) {
            this.initCommentsPageNavigation();
            this.navigateToFirstComment(false);
            this.initChromeBuiltinAI();
            this.summaryPanel = new SummaryPanel();
        }

        // Set up keyboard shortcuts
        this.setupKeyBoardShortcuts();
    }

    /**
     * Logs debug messages if debug mode is enabled
     * @param {...any} args - Arguments to log
     */
    logDebug(...args) {
        if (HNEnhancer.DEBUG) {
            console.log('[DEBUG] ', ...args);
        }
    }

    /**
     * Logs info messages
     * @param {...any} args - Arguments to log
     */
    logInfo(...args) {
        console.log('[INFO] ', ...args);
    }

    /**
     * Checks if the current page is a home page
     * @returns {boolean} True if the current page is a home page
     */
    get isHomePage() {
        const pathname = window.location.pathname;
        return pathname === '/' || pathname === '/news' || pathname === '/newest' || 
               pathname === '/ask' || pathname === '/show' || pathname === '/front' || 
               pathname === '/shownew';
    }

    /**
     * Checks if the current page is a comments page
     * @returns {boolean} True if the current page is a comments page
     */
    get isCommentsPage() {
        return window.location.pathname === '/item';
    }

    // Placeholder methods to be implemented or moved to separate modules
    createAuthorCommentsMap() {
        // Implementation will be moved to author-tracking.js
        const authorCommentsMap = new Map();
        const comments = document.querySelectorAll('.athing.comtr');
        comments.forEach(comment => {
            const authorElement = comment.querySelector('.hnuser');
            if (authorElement) {
                const author = authorElement.textContent;
                if (!authorCommentsMap.has(author)) {
                    authorCommentsMap.set(author, []);
                }
                authorCommentsMap.get(author).push(comment);
            }
        });
        return authorCommentsMap;
    }

    createAuthorPopup() {
        const popup = document.createElement('div');
        popup.className = 'author-popup';
        document.body.appendChild(popup);
        return popup;
    }

    getPostAuthor() {
        const postAuthorElement = document.querySelector('.fatitem .hnuser');
        return postAuthorElement ? postAuthorElement.textContent : null;
    }

    createHelpModal() {
        // Implementation will be moved to ui-components.js
        const modal = document.createElement('div');
        modal.className = 'keyboard-help-modal';
        modal.style.display = 'none';
        // Simplified implementation
        document.body.appendChild(modal);
        return modal;
    }

    createHelpIcon() {
        // Implementation will be moved to ui-components.js
        const icon = document.createElement('div');
        icon.className = 'help-icon';
        icon.innerHTML = '?';
        icon.title = 'Keyboard Shortcuts (Press ? or / to toggle)';
        icon.onclick = () => this.toggleHelpModal(true);
        document.body.appendChild(icon);
        return icon;
    }

    toggleHelpModal(show) {
        this.helpModal.style.display = show ? 'flex' : 'none';
    }

    initHomePageNavigation() {
        // Implementation will be moved to navigation.js
        this.allPosts = document.querySelectorAll('.athing');
        HNState.getLastSeenPostId().then(lastSeenPostId => {
            let lastSeenPostIndex = -1;
            if (lastSeenPostId) {
                this.logDebug(`Got last seen post id from storage: ${lastSeenPostId}`);
                const posts = Array.from(this.allPosts);
                lastSeenPostIndex = posts.findIndex(post => DomUtils.getPostId(post) === lastSeenPostId);
            }
            if (lastSeenPostIndex !== -1) {
                this.setCurrentPostIndex(lastSeenPostIndex);
            } else {
                this.navigateToPost('first');
            }
        });
    }

    initCommentsPageNavigation() {
        // Implementation will be moved to navigation.js
        // Simplified implementation
    }

    navigateToFirstComment(scrollToComment = true) {
        // Implementation will be moved to navigation.js
        const firstComment = document.querySelector('.athing.comtr');
        if (firstComment) {
            this.setCurrentComment(firstComment, scrollToComment);
        }
    }

    setCurrentComment(comment, scrollIntoView = true) {
        // Implementation will be moved to navigation.js
        // Simplified implementation
    }

    setupKeyBoardShortcuts() {
        // Implementation will be moved to navigation.js
        // Simplified implementation
    }

    initChromeBuiltinAI() {
        // Implementation will be moved to summarization.js
        // Simplified implementation
    }

    navigateToPost(direction) {
        // Implementation will be moved to navigation.js
        // Simplified implementation
    }

    setCurrentPostIndex(postIndex) {
        // Implementation will be moved to navigation.js
        // Simplified implementation
    }
}
