const CHAT_HISTORY_CLEANUP_ALARM = 'chatHistoryCleanupAlarm';

async function onInstalled() {
  console.log("Extension installed/updated. Setting up alarm...");
  // Setup alarm for daily cleanup
  try {
    await chrome.alarms.create(CHAT_HISTORY_CLEANUP_ALARM, {
      periodInMinutes: 1440 // Run once a day (24 * 60)
    });
    console.log(`Alarm '${CHAT_HISTORY_CLEANUP_ALARM}' created/updated.`);
    // Run cleanup immediately on install/update as well
    await clearExpiredChatHistoryWrapper();
  } catch (alarmError) {
    console.error("Error setting up alarm:", alarmError);
  }


  // Check if provider is selected, open options if not
  const data = await chrome.storage.sync.get("settings");
  const providerSelection = data.settings?.providerSelection;

  if (!providerSelection) {
    try {
      chrome.runtime.openOptionsPage();
    } catch (e) {
      console.log("Error opening options page:", e);
    }
  }
}

/**
 * Manages state persistence for the Hacker News Companion extension
 */
class HNState {
    // Constants
    static CHAT_HISTORY_EXPIRATION_MS = 24 * 60 * 60 * 1000; // 24 hours

    /**
     * Saves the last seen post ID to local storage
     * @param {string} postId - The ID of the post to save
     */
    static saveLastSeenPostId(postId) {
        chrome.storage.local.set({
            lastSeenPost: {
                id: postId,
                timestamp: Date.now()
            }
        }).catch(_ => {
            // console.error('Error saving current post state:', _);
        });
    }

    /**
     * Retrieves the last seen post ID from local storage
     * @returns {Promise<string|null>} The last seen post ID or null if not found or expired
     */
    static async getLastSeenPostId() {
        try {
            const data = await chrome.storage.local.get('lastSeenPost');
            // Return null if no state or if state is older than 15 minutes
            if (!data.lastSeenPost || Date.now() - data.lastSeenPost.timestamp > (15 * 60 * 1000)) {
                await this.clearLastSeenPost();
                return null;
            }
            return data.lastSeenPost.id;
        } catch (error) {
            // console.error('Error retrieving saved post state:', error);
            return null;
        }
    }

    /**
     * Clears the last seen post from local storage
     */
    static async clearLastSeenPost() {
        chrome.storage.local.remove('lastSeenPost').catch(_ => {
            // console.error('Error clearing lastSeenPost post state:', _);
        });
    }
=======
/**
 * Manages state persistence for the Hacker News Companion extension
 */
class HNState {
    // Constants
    static CHAT_HISTORY_EXPIRATION_MS = 24 * 60 * 60 * 1000; // 24 hours

    /**
     * Saves the last seen post ID to local storage
     * @param {string} postId - The ID of the post to save
     */
    static saveLastSeenPostId(postId) {
        chrome.storage.local.set({
            lastSeenPost: {
                id: postId,
                timestamp: Date.now()
            }
        }).catch(_ => {
            // console.error('Error saving current post state:', _);
        });
    }

    /**
     * Retrieves the last seen post ID from local storage
     * @returns {Promise<string|null>} The last seen post ID or null if not found or expired
     */
    static async getLastSeenPostId() {
        try {
            const data = await chrome.storage.local.get('lastSeenPost');
            // Return null if no state or if state is older than 15 minutes
            if (!data.lastSeenPost || Date.now() - data.lastSeenPost.timestamp > (15 * 60 * 1000)) {
                await this.clearLastSeenPost();
                return null;
            }
            return data.lastSeenPost.id;
        } catch (error) {
            // console.error('Error retrieving saved post state:', error);
            return null;
        }
    }

    /**
     * Clears the last seen post from local storage
     */
    static async clearLastSeenPost() {
        chrome.storage.local.remove('lastSeenPost').catch(_ => {
            // console.error('Error clearing lastSeenPost post state:', _);
        });
    }

    /**
     * Generates the storage key for chat history.
     * @param {string} commentId - The ID of the target comment.
     * @param {string} contextType - The context type ('parents', 'descendants', 'children').
     * @returns {string} The storage key.
     * @private
     */
    static _getChatHistoryKey(commentId, contextType) {
        return `chatHistory_${commentId}_${contextType}`;
    }

    /**
     * Saves the chat history for a specific comment and context type.
     * @param {string} commentId - The ID of the target comment.
     * @param {string} contextType - The context type ('parents', 'descendants', 'children').
     * @param {Array<object>} history - The conversation history array.
     */
    static saveChatHistory(commentId, contextType, history) {
        if (!commentId || !contextType || !history) {
            console.error("saveChatHistory: Missing required parameters.");
            return;
        }
        const key = this._getChatHistoryKey(commentId, contextType);
        const dataToSave = {
            history: history,
            timestamp: Date.now()
        };

        chrome.storage.local.set({ [key]: dataToSave }).catch(error => {
            console.error(`Error saving chat history for key ${key}:`, error);
        });
    }

    /**
     * Loads the chat history for a specific comment and context type.
     * @param {string} commentId - The ID of the target comment.
     * @param {string} contextType - The context type ('parents', 'descendants', 'children').
     * @returns {Promise<Array<object>|null>} The chat history array, or null if not found or expired.
     */
    static async loadChatHistory(commentId, contextType) {
        if (!commentId || !contextType) {
            console.error("loadChatHistory: Missing required parameters.");
            return null;
        }
        const key = this._getChatHistoryKey(commentId, contextType);

        try {
            const data = await chrome.storage.local.get(key);
            const savedData = data[key];

            if (!savedData || !savedData.history || !savedData.timestamp) {
                // console.log(`No chat history found for key: ${key}`);
                return null;
            }

            // Check for expiration
            const isExpired = Date.now() - savedData.timestamp > this.CHAT_HISTORY_EXPIRATION_MS;
            if (isExpired) {
                console.log(`Chat history expired for key: ${key}. Clearing.`);
                // Optionally clear the expired data
                chrome.storage.local.remove(key).catch(error => {
                    console.error(`Error clearing expired chat history for key ${key}:`, error);
                });
                return null;
            }

            // console.log(`Chat history loaded successfully for key: ${key}`);
            return savedData.history; // Return only the history array
        } catch (error) {
            console.error(`Error loading chat history for key ${key}:`, error);
            return null;
        }
    }

    /**
     * Clears expired chat history entries from storage.
     * @returns {Promise<number>} The number of expired entries cleared.
     */
    static async clearExpiredChatHistory() {
        try {
            // Get all items from storage
            const data = await chrome.storage.local.get(null);
            const now = Date.now();
            const keysToRemove = [];

            // Find chat history keys that have expired
            for (const [key, value] of Object.entries(data)) {
                if (key.startsWith('chatHistory_') && value && value.timestamp) {
                    const isExpired = now - value.timestamp > this.CHAT_HISTORY_EXPIRATION_MS;
                    if (isExpired) {
                        keysToRemove.push(key);
                    }
                }
            }

            // Remove expired keys if any found
            if (keysToRemove.length > 0) {
                console.log(`Clearing ${keysToRemove.length} expired chat history entries:`, keysToRemove);
                await chrome.storage.local.remove(keysToRemove);
            } else {
                console.log('No expired chat history entries found.');
            }

            return keysToRemove.length;
        } catch (error) {
            console.error('Error clearing expired chat history:', error);
            return 0;
        }
    }
>>>>>>> REPLACE
````

  open(commentElement) {

      this.enhancer.logDebug("Modal element not found, cannot open.");
      return;
    }

    const commentId = this.enhancer.domUtils.getCommentId(commentElement);

    this.inputElement.disabled = true; // Disable input initially
    this.sendButton.disabled = true;
    this.conversationHistory = []; // Clear history initially

    this.modalElement.style.display = "flex"; // Show the modal

    this._gatherContextAndInitiateChat(); // Gather context and initiate
    this.inputElement.focus();

  async _handleSendMessage() {
    const message = this.inputElement.value.trim();
    this.enhancer.logDebug("Send button clicked. Message:", message); // <-- 添加日志

    // Don't send if message is empty. Check for AI session later based on provider.
    if (!message) {
        this.enhancer.logDebug("Empty message, not sending.");
        return;
    }

    // Check for Chrome AI session specifically if that's the provider
    if (this.currentAiProvider === 'chrome-ai' && !this.aiSession) {
        this.enhancer.logDebug("Chrome AI selected but no active session, not sending.");
        this._displayMessage("Error: Chrome AI session is not active. Please try reopening the chat.", "system");
        return;

    this.enhancer.logDebug(`User message to send: ${message}`);

    this.sendButton.disabled = true;
    this.currentLlmMessageElement = null; // Reset streaming element holder

    this.conversationHistory.push(userMessageEntry);
    this.enhancer.logDebug("Added user message to history:", userMessageEntry);

    // and after the stream for Chrome AI. This block might need further adjustment

      this.inputElement.disabled = false;
      this.sendButton.disabled = false;
      this.inputElement.focus();
    }
  }

6. Update the `_switchContext` method to load chat history for the new context:

src/chat-modal.js
````javascript
<<<<<<< SEARCH
  /**
   * Switches the chat context type, clears the conversation, and re-initiates the chat.
   * @param {string} newContextType - The new context type ('parents', 'descendants', 'children').
   * @private
   */
  async _switchContext(newContextType) {
      if (newContextType === this.currentContextType) {
          this.enhancer.logDebug(`Context type already set to ${newContextType}, no change needed.`);
          return; // No change needed
      }

      this.enhancer.logInfo(`Switching chat context to: ${newContextType}`);

      // 1. Update state (will be updated again in _gatherContextAndInitiateChat, but good practice)
      this.currentContextType = newContextType;

      // 2. Clear conversation area and history
      this.conversationArea.innerHTML = ""; // Clear visually
      this.conversationHistory = []; // Clear internal history
      this.currentLlmMessageElement = null; // Reset stream element

      // 3. Disable input while loading new context
      this.inputElement.disabled = true;
      this.sendButton.disabled = true;

      // 4. Gather context and re-initiate chat
      await this._gatherContextAndInitiateChat(newContextType);
      this.inputElement.focus(); // Ensure focus is set
  }
=======
  /**
   * Switches the chat context type, clears the conversation, and re-initiates the chat.
   * @param {string} newContextType - The new context type ('parents', 'descendants', 'children').
   * @private
   */
  async _switchContext(newContextType) {
      if (newContextType === this.currentContextType) {
          this.enhancer.logDebug(`Context type already set to ${newContextType}, no change needed.`);
          return; // No change needed
      }

      this.enhancer.logInfo(`Switching chat context to: ${newContextType}`);

      // 1. Update state (will be updated again in _gatherContextAndInitiateChat, but good practice)
      this.currentContextType = newContextType;

      // 2. Clear conversation area and history
      this.conversationArea.innerHTML = ""; // Clear visually
      this.conversationHistory = []; // Clear internal history
      this.currentLlmMessageElement = null; // Reset stream element

      // 3. Disable input while loading new context
      this.inputElement.disabled = true;
      this.sendButton.disabled = true;

      // 4. Try loading history for the new context type
      const commentId = this.enhancer.domUtils.getCommentId(this.targetCommentElement);
      let loadedHistory = null;
      if (commentId) {
          loadedHistory = await HNState.loadChatHistory(commentId, newContextType);
      }

      if (loadedHistory && loadedHistory.length > 0) {
          this.enhancer.logInfo(`Loaded ${loadedHistory.length} messages from history for comment ${commentId}, context ${newContextType}`);
          this.conversationHistory = loadedHistory; // Restore history
          // Display loaded history
          this.conversationHistory.forEach(message => {
              this._displayMessage(message.content, message.role);
          });
          // Enable input
          this.inputElement.disabled = false; // Enable input
          this.sendButton.disabled = false;
          this.inputElement.focus();
      } else {
          this.enhancer.logInfo(`No valid history found for comment ${commentId}, context ${newContextType}. Gathering fresh context...`);
          // No history or expired, proceed with gathering context
          this.conversationArea.innerHTML = "<p><em>Gathering context...</em></p>"; // Show gathering message
          this.inputElement.disabled = true; // Keep disabled until context is ready
          this.sendButton.disabled = true;
          await this._gatherContextAndInitiateChat(newContextType); // Gather context and initiate
          // _gatherContextAndInitiateChat will re-enable input on completion/error
      }
      this.inputElement.focus(); // Ensure focus is set after potential async operations
  }
>>>>>>> REPLACE
````

// Import HNState class

  importScripts('src/hn-state.js');
  console.log("HNState imported successfully into background script.");
} catch (e) {
  console.error("Error importing HNState into background script:", e);
}

const CHAT_HISTORY_CLEANUP_ALARM = 'chatHistoryCleanupAlarm';

async function onInstalled() {
  console.log("Extension installed/updated. Setting up alarm...");
  // Setup alarm for daily cleanup
  try {
    await chrome.alarms.create(CHAT_HISTORY_CLEANUP_ALARM, {
      periodInMinutes: 1440 // Run once a day (24 * 60)
    });
    console.log(`Alarm '${CHAT_HISTORY_CLEANUP_ALARM}' created/updated.`);
    // Run cleanup immediately on install/update as well
    await clearExpiredChatHistoryWrapper();
  } catch (alarmError) {
    console.error("Error setting up alarm:", alarmError);
  }

8. Add the alarm listener and cleanup wrapper function to the background script:

background.js
````javascript

// 启用安装处理程序
chrome.runtime.onInstalled.addListener(onInstalled);
=======
// --- Alarm Listener ---
chrome.alarms.onAlarm.addListener(async (alarm) => {
  console.log("Alarm triggered:", alarm.name);
  if (alarm.name === CHAT_HISTORY_CLEANUP_ALARM) {
    await clearExpiredChatHistoryWrapper();
  }
});

// --- Wrapper function to call HNState method ---
async function clearExpiredChatHistoryWrapper() {
  console.log("Running clearExpiredChatHistoryWrapper...");
  if (typeof HNState !== 'undefined' && typeof HNState.clearExpiredChatHistory === 'function') {
    try {
      await HNState.clearExpiredChatHistory(); // Call the static method
      console.log("Expired chat history cleanup finished.");
    } catch (error) {
      console.error("Error during expired chat history cleanup:", error);
    }
  } else {
    console.error("HNState or HNState.clearExpiredChatHistory is not available in background script.");
  }
}

// 启用安装处理程序
chrome.runtime.onInstalled.addListener(onInstalled);
>>>>>>> REPLACE
````

These changes implement the Chat History Persistence feature as requested. The implementation:

1. Adds methods to `HNState` for saving, loading, and clearing chat history
2. Updates `ChatModal` to load history when opening the modal or switching context
3. Saves history after user messages and AI responses
4. Sets up a daily alarm to clean up expired chat history entries
5. Runs an immediate cleanup on extension install/update

```bash
# You can test the chat history persistence by:
# 1. Opening a chat for a comment
# 2. Having a conversation
# 3. Closing the chat
# 4. Reopening the chat for the same comment to see if history is restored
```

> Tokens: 49k sent, 5.7k received. Cost: $0.23 message, $1.81 session.  
> The LLM did not conform to the edit format.  
> https://aider.chat/docs/troubleshooting/edit-errors.html

  /**
   * Opens the chat modal.
   * @param {HTMLElement} commentElement - The specific comment element (.athing.comtr) to chat about.
   */
  open(commentElement) {
    if (!this.modalElement) {
      this.enhancer.logDebug("Modal element not found, cannot open.");
      return;
    }
    this.targetCommentElement = commentElement;
    const commentId = this.enhancer.domUtils.getCommentId(commentElement);
    this.enhancer.logInfo(`Opening chat for comment ID: ${commentId}`);

    // Reset state
    this.conversationArea.innerHTML = "<p><em>Gathering context...</em></p>"; // Clear previous chat
    this.inputElement.value = "";
    this.inputElement.disabled = true; // Disable input initially
    this.sendButton.disabled = true;
    this.conversationHistory = []; // Clear history initially

    this.modalElement.style.display = "flex"; // Show the modal

    this._gatherContextAndInitiateChat(); // Gather context and initiate

  async _handleSendMessage() {
    const message = this.inputElement.value.trim();
    this.enhancer.logDebug("Send button clicked. Message:", message); // <-- 添加日志

    // Don't send if message is empty. Check for AI session later based on provider.
    if (!message) {
        this.enhancer.logDebug("Empty message, not sending.");
        return;
    }

    // Check for Chrome AI session specifically if that's the provider
    if (this.currentAiProvider === 'chrome-ai' && !this.aiSession) {
        this.enhancer.logDebug("Chrome AI selected but no active session, not sending.");
        this._displayMessage("Error: Chrome AI session is not active. Please try reopening the chat.", "system");
        return;
    }


    this.enhancer.logDebug(`User message to send: ${message}`);
    this._displayMessage(message, "user"); // Display user message immediately
    this.inputElement.value = ""; // Clear input
    this.inputElement.disabled = true; // Disable input while LLM responds
    this.sendButton.disabled = true;
    this.currentLlmMessageElement = null; // Reset streaming element holder

    // Add user message to history
    const userMessageEntry = { role: "user", content: message };
    this.conversationHistory.push(userMessageEntry);
    this.enhancer.logDebug("Added user message to history:", userMessageEntry);

    // Send the entire history to the AI
    await this._sendMessageToAI(this.conversationHistory);

    // Re-enable input only if AI session is still valid (for Chrome AI) or if not Chrome AI
    // Note: Input re-enabling is now handled within _sendMessageToAI for non-streaming providers
    // and after the stream for Chrome AI. This block might need further adjustment
    // depending on the final flow in _sendMessageToAI.
    // Let's keep the original re-enable logic for Chrome AI for now.
    if (this.currentAiProvider === 'chrome-ai' && this.aiSession) {
      this.inputElement.disabled = false;
      this.sendButton.disabled = false;
      this.inputElement.focus();
    }
  }

  /**
   * Handles sending a message (placeholder).
   * @private
   */
  async _handleSendMessage() {
    const message = this.inputElement.value.trim();
    this.enhancer.logDebug("Send button clicked. Message:", message); // <-- 添加日志

    // Don't send if message is empty. Check for AI session later based on provider.
    if (!message) {
        this.enhancer.logDebug("Empty message, not sending.");
        return;
    }

    // Check for Chrome AI session specifically if that's the provider
    if (this.currentAiProvider === 'chrome-ai' && !this.aiSession) {
        this.enhancer.logDebug("Chrome AI selected but no active session, not sending.");
        this._displayMessage("Error: Chrome AI session is not active. Please try reopening the chat.", "system");
        return;
    }


    this.enhancer.logDebug(`User message to send: ${message}`);
    this._displayMessage(message, "user"); // Display user message immediately
    this.inputElement.value = ""; // Clear input
    this.inputElement.disabled = true; // Disable input while LLM responds
    this.sendButton.disabled = true;
    this.currentLlmMessageElement = null; // Reset streaming element holder

    // Add user message to history
    const userMessageEntry = { role: "user", content: message };
    this.conversationHistory.push(userMessageEntry);
    this.enhancer.logDebug("Added user message to history:", userMessageEntry);

    // --- Save History ---
    const commentId = this.enhancer.domUtils.getCommentId(this.targetCommentElement);
    if (commentId) {
        // Save history *before* sending to AI, in case sending fails
        this.enhancer.hnState.saveChatHistory(commentId, this.currentContextType, this.conversationHistory);
        this.enhancer.logDebug(`Saved history (${this.conversationHistory.length} messages) after user message for comment ${commentId}, context ${this.currentContextType}`);
    }

    // Send the entire history to the AI
    await this._sendMessageToAI(this.conversationHistory); // _sendMessageToAI will save history again after getting AI response

    // Re-enable input only if AI session is still valid (for Chrome AI) or if not Chrome AI
    // Note: Input re-enabling is now handled within _sendMessageToAI for non-streaming providers
    // and after the stream for Chrome AI. This block might need further adjustment
    // depending on the final flow in _sendMessageToAI.
    // Let's keep the original re-enable logic for Chrome AI for now.
    if (this.currentAiProvider === 'chrome-ai' && this.aiSession) {
      this.inputElement.disabled = false;
      this.sendButton.disabled = false;
````

   * @private
   */
  async _switchContext(newContextType) {
      if (newContextType === this.currentContextType) {
          this.enhancer.logDebug(`Context type already set to ${newContextType}, no change needed.`);
          return; // No change needed
      }

      this.enhancer.logInfo(`Switching chat context to: ${newContextType}`);

      // 1. Update state (will be updated again in _gatherContextAndInitiateChat, but good practice)
      this.currentContextType = newContextType;

      // 2. Clear conversation area and history
      this.conversationArea.innerHTML = ""; // Clear visually
      this.conversationHistory = []; // Clear internal history
      this.currentLlmMessageElement = null; // Reset stream element

      // 3. Disable input while loading new context
      this.inputElement.disabled = true;
      this.sendButton.disabled = true;

      // 4. Try loading history for the new context type
      const commentId = this.enhancer.domUtils.getCommentId(this.targetCommentElement);
      let loadedHistory = null;
      if (commentId) {
          loadedHistory = await this.enhancer.hnState.loadChatHistory(commentId, newContextType);
````

src/hn-state.js
<<<<<<< SEARCH
        }
    }

    /**
     * Clears expired chat history entries from storage.
     * @returns {Promise<number>} The number of expired entries cleared.
     */
    static async clearExpiredChatHistory() {
        try {
            // Get all items from storage
            const data = await chrome.storage.local.get(null);
            const now = Date.now();
            const keysToRemove = [];

            // Find chat history keys that have expired
            for (const [key, value] of Object.entries(data)) {
                if (key.startsWith('chatHistory_') && value && value.timestamp) {
                    const isExpired = now - value.timestamp > this.CHAT_HISTORY_EXPIRATION_MS;
                    if (isExpired) {
                        keysToRemove.push(key);
                    }
                }
            }

            // Remove expired keys if any found
            if (keysToRemove.length > 0) {
                console.log(`Clearing ${keysToRemove.length} expired chat history entries:`, keysToRemove);
                await chrome.storage.local.remove(keysToRemove);
            } else {
                console.log('No expired chat history entries found.');
            }

            return keysToRemove.length;
        } catch (error) {
            console.error('Error clearing expired chat history:', error);
            return 0;
        }
    }

    /**
     * Generates the storage key for chat history.

    }

调整 `_switchContext` 方法以始终获取上下文，移除加载历史记录的逻辑：
````
src/chat-modal.js
<<<<<<< SEARCH
      this.sendButton.disabled = true;

      // 4. Try loading history for the new context type
      const commentId = this.enhancer.domUtils.getCommentId(this.targetCommentElement);
      let loadedHistory = null;
      if (commentId) {
          loadedHistory = await HNState.loadChatHistory(commentId, newContextType);
      }

      if (loadedHistory && loadedHistory.length > 0) {
          this.enhancer.logInfo(`Loaded ${loadedHistory.length} messages from history for comment ${commentId}, context ${newContextType}`);
          this.conversationHistory = loadedHistory; // Restore history
          // Display loaded history
          this.conversationHistory.forEach(message => {
              this._displayMessage(message.content, message.role);
          });
          // Enable input
          this.inputElement.disabled = false; // Enable input
          this.sendButton.disabled = false;
          this.inputElement.focus();
      } else {
          this.enhancer.logInfo(`No valid history found for comment ${commentId}, context ${newContextType}. Gathering fresh context...`);
          // No history or expired, proceed with gathering context
          this.conversationArea.innerHTML = "<p><em>Gathering context...</em></p>"; // Show gathering message
          this.inputElement.disabled = true; // Keep disabled until context is ready
          this.sendButton.disabled = true;
          await this._gatherContextAndInitiateChat(newContextType); // Gather context and initiate
          // _gatherContextAndInitiateChat will re-enable input on completion/error
      }
      this.inputElement.focus(); // Ensure focus is set after potential async operations

PLAN.md

  - Result: 确认函数位置正确，无需代码更改。聊天上下文切换功能经测试已正常工作。


# Feature Plan: Chat History Persistence (In Progress)

**Goal:** Persist chat conversations for specific comments and context types (parents, descendants, children) in local storage, allowing users to resume chats later. Implement an expiration mechanism (e.g., 24 hours) to automatically clean up old history.

**Sub-tasks:**

1.  **Storage Design (`src/hn-state.js`):** (Completed 2025-04-10)
    *   Defined storage key structure (`chatHistory_<commentId>_<contextType>`).
    *   Store `conversationHistory` array and `timestamp`.
    *   Implemented `saveChatHistory`, `loadChatHistory` (with expiration check and removal on load), and `clearExpiredChatHistory`.
    *   Set expiration to 24 hours (`CHAT_HISTORY_EXPIRATION_MS`).
2.  **Chat Modal Integration (`src/chat-modal.js`):** (Completed 2025-04-10)
    *   Modified `open()`: Calls `loadChatHistory`. Displays history if found and valid, otherwise gathers context.
    *   Modified `_handleSendMessage()` and `_sendMessageToAI()`: Calls `saveChatHistory` after adding user/AI messages to `conversationHistory`.
    *   Modified `_switchContext(newContextType)`: Calls `loadChatHistory`. Displays history if found and valid, otherwise gathers context.
3.  **Background Cleanup (`background.js`):** (Completed 2025-04-10)
    *   Added `alarms` permission to `manifest.chrome.json`.
    *   Used `importScripts` to load `hn-state.js`.
    *   Created a daily `chrome.alarms` alarm (`chatHistoryCleanupAlarm`) in `onInstalled`.
    *   Added `onAlarm` listener to call `HNState.clearExpiredChatHistory()`.
    *   Added immediate cleanup call in `onInstalled`.
4.  **Testing:** (Next Step)
    *   Verify chat history is saved after sending/receiving messages for different contexts.
    *   Verify history is loaded correctly when reopening the modal for the same comment/context.
    *   Verify switching context loads the appropriate history or starts fresh if none exists/expired.
    *   Verify closing the browser tab/window and reopening preserves history (within 24 hours).
    *   Test expiration:
        *   Check `chrome.storage.local` for `chatHistory_...` keys.
        *   Manually change system time or stored timestamps to confirm old history is *not* loaded by `loadChatHistory`.
        *   Trigger the alarm manually (via extension reload/update or dev tools) and verify expired entries are removed from `chrome.storage.local`.
    *   Check `chrome.storage.local` usage to ensure keys are being created and removed correctly.

# Known Bugs:
1. 当有的评论被折叠后，就无法通过点击统计面板里的链接定位到该评论.
=======
  - Result: 确认函数位置正确，无需代码更改。聊天上下文切换功能经测试已正常工作。

你可能想要运行以下命令来重新构建扩展并加载更新后的版本：

```bash
pnpm run dev-build
```

# Feature Plan: Chat History Persistence (In Progress)

**Goal:** Persist chat conversations for specific comments and context types (parents, descendants, children) in local storage, allowing users to resume chats later. Implement an expiration mechanism (e.g., 24 hours) to automatically clean up old history.

**Sub-tasks:**

1.  **Storage Design (`src/hn-state.js`):** (Completed 2025-04-10)
    *   Defined storage key structure (`chatHistory_<commentId>_<contextType>`).
    *   Store `conversationHistory` array and `timestamp`.
    *   Implemented `saveChatHistory`, `loadChatHistory` (with expiration check and removal on load), and `clearExpiredChatHistory`.
    *   Set expiration to 24 hours (`CHAT_HISTORY_EXPIRATION_MS`).
2.  **Chat Modal Integration (`src/chat-modal.js`):** (Completed 2025-04-10)
    *   Modified `open()`: Calls `loadChatHistory`. Displays history if found and valid, otherwise gathers context.
    *   Modified `_handleSendMessage()` and `_sendMessageToAI()`: Calls `saveChatHistory` after adding user/AI messages to `conversationHistory`.
    *   Modified `_switchContext(newContextType)`: Calls `loadChatHistory`. Displays history if found and valid, otherwise gathers context.
3.  **Background Cleanup (`background.js`):** (Completed 2025-04-10)
    *   Added `alarms` permission to `manifest.chrome.json`.
    *   Used `importScripts` to load `hn-state.js`.
    *   Created a daily `chrome.alarms` alarm (`chatHistoryCleanupAlarm`) in `onInstalled`.
    *   Added `onAlarm` listener to call `HNState.clearExpiredChatHistory()`.
    *   Added immediate cleanup call in `onInstalled`.
4.  **Testing:** (Next Step)
    *   Verify chat history is saved after sending/receiving messages for different contexts.
    *   Verify history is loaded correctly when reopening the modal for the same comment/context.
    *   Verify switching context loads the appropriate history or starts fresh if none exists/expired.
    *   Verify closing the browser tab/window and reopening preserves history (within 24 hours).
    *   Test expiration:
        *   Check `chrome.storage.local` for `chatHistory_...` keys.
        *   Manually change system time or stored timestamps to confirm old history is *not* loaded by `loadChatHistory`.
        *   Trigger the alarm manually (via extension reload/update or dev tools) and verify expired entries are removed from `chrome.storage.local`.
    *   Check `chrome.storage.local` usage to ensure keys are being created and removed correctly.

# Known Bugs:

````
- **调试 `getDirectChildComments` TypeError (Commit `95291b7`):**
  - **Issue:** 在聊天模态框中切换上下文时，出现 `TypeError: DomUtils.getDirectChildComments is not a function` 错误。
  - **Initial Diagnosis:** 错误地认为 `getDirectChildComments` 函数定义在 `DomUtils` 类外部。
  - **Investigation:** 检查 `src/dom-utils.js` 文件内容，发现 `getDirectChildComments` *已经* 正确地定义为 `DomUtils` 类内部的 `static` 方法。
  - **Conclusion:** 之前的移动函数的尝试是基于错误的诊断，因此撤销了相关更改。原始的 TypeError 可能源于 `chat-modal.js` 中 `this.enhancer.domUtils` 实例的初始化或访问时机问题，但在后续测试中该错误已不再出现。
  - **Result:** 确认函数位置正确，无需代码更改。聊天上下文切换功能经测试已正常工作。

好的，看起来 `src/hn-state.js` 文件中存在一个语法错误，导致 `HNState` 类没有被正确定义，从而引发了后续的 `ReferenceError`。

错误 `Uncaught SyntaxError: Unexpected token 'catch' (at hn-state.js:103:11)` 指向了 `src/hn-state.js` 文件。检查该文件，我发现 `_getChatHistoryKey`, `saveChatHistory`, 和 `loadChatHistory` 方法被意外地复制了一份。我们需要移除这个重复的代码块。

以下是修复 `src/hn-state.js` 的 *SEARCH/REPLACE* 块：

````
src/hn-state.js
<<<<<<< SEARCH
        }
    }

    /**
     * Generates the storage key for chat history.
     * @param {string} commentId - The ID of the target comment.
     * @param {string} contextType - The context type ('parents', 'descendants', 'children').
     * @returns {string} The storage key.
     * @private
     */
    static _getChatHistoryKey(commentId, contextType) {
        return `chatHistory_${commentId}_${contextType}`;
    }

    /**
     * Saves the chat history for a specific comment and context type.
     * @param {string} commentId - The ID of the target comment.
     * @param {string} contextType - The context type ('parents', 'descendants', 'children').
     * @param {Array<object>} history - The conversation history array.
     */
    static saveChatHistory(commentId, contextType, history) {
        if (!commentId || !contextType || !history) {
            console.error("saveChatHistory: Missing required parameters.");
            return;
        }
        const key = this._getChatHistoryKey(commentId, contextType);
        const dataToSave = {
            history: history,
            timestamp: Date.now()
        };

        chrome.storage.local.set({ [key]: dataToSave }).catch(error => {
            console.error(`Error saving chat history for key ${key}:`, error);
        });
    }

    /**
     * Loads the chat history for a specific comment and context type.
     * @param {string} commentId - The ID of the target comment.
     * @param {string} contextType - The context type ('parents', 'descendants', 'children').
     * @returns {Promise<Array<object>|null>} The chat history array, or null if not found or expired.
     */
    static async loadChatHistory(commentId, contextType) {
        if (!commentId || !contextType) {
            console.error("loadChatHistory: Missing required parameters.");
            return null;
        }
        const key = this._getChatHistoryKey(commentId, contextType);

        try {
            const data = await chrome.storage.local.get(key);
            const savedData = data[key];

            if (!savedData || !savedData.history || !savedData.timestamp) {
                // console.log(`No chat history found for key: ${key}`);
                return null;
            }

            // Check for expiration
            const isExpired = Date.now() - savedData.timestamp > this.CHAT_HISTORY_EXPIRATION_MS;
            if (isExpired) {
                console.log(`Chat history expired for key: ${key}. Clearing.`);
                // Optionally clear the expired data
                chrome.storage.local.remove(key).catch(error => {
                    console.error(`Error clearing expired chat history for key ${key}:`, error);
                });
                return null;
            }

            // console.log(`Chat history loaded successfully for key: ${key}`);
            return savedData.history; // Return only the history array
        } catch (error) {
            console.error(`Error loading chat history for key ${key}:`, error);
            return null;
        }
    }
=======
        }
    }
>>>>>>> REPLACE
````

修复这个语法错误应该也能解决 `ReferenceError: HNState is not defined` 的问题，因为脚本现在可以正确加载和执行了。

你可能想要运行以下命令来重新构建扩展并加载更新后的版本：

```bash
pnpm run dev-build
```

# Known Bugs:
1. 当有的评论被折叠后，就无法通过点击统计面板里的链接定位到该评论.
2. 点击 "Chat" 链接后，模态框会打开，会有多余的一条消息：Gathering parents context.... 但是再点击其他上下文之后就没有了。只有正常的: Context loaded (xxx) xxxxx
=======
# Feature Plan: Chat History Persistence

**Goal:** Implement a mechanism to save and load chat conversations locally, so users can resume their chat about a specific comment and context type after closing and reopening the modal.

**Sub-tasks:**

1.  **Storage Strategy:**
    - Use `chrome.storage.local` for persistence.
    - Define storage key: `chatHistory_<postId>_<commentId>_<contextType>`.
2.  **HNState Integration (`src/hn-state.js`):**
    - Add `saveChatHistory(postId, commentId, contextType, history)` function.
    - Add `getChatHistory(postId, commentId, contextType)` function.
    - Add `clearChatHistory(postId, commentId, contextType)` function (optional for now).
3.  **HNEnhancer Update (`src/hn-enhancer.js`):**
    - Modify `openChatModal` to retrieve the current `postId` using `DomUtils.getCurrentHNItemId()`.
    - Pass the `postId` to the `ChatModal.open` method.
4.  **ChatModal Logic Update (`src/chat-modal.js`):**
    - Store `postId` in the `ChatModal` instance.
    - **Loading:** In `_gatherContextAndInitiateChat`, call `HNState.getChatHistory`. If history exists, load it, render messages, and skip initial context generation.
    - **Saving:**
        - In `_gatherContextAndInitiateChat`, after successfully loading *new* context (when no history was found), save the initial history (system prompt + context) using `HNState.saveChatHistory`.
        - In `_sendMessageToAI`, after receiving an AI response and adding it to `this.conversationHistory`, save the updated history using `HNState.saveChatHistory`.
    - **Clearing:** Consider adding a "Clear Chat" button in the future.
5.  **Testing:**
    - Start a chat, send messages, close modal.
    - Reopen chat for the same comment/context, verify history loads.
    - Switch context, verify new chat starts (or loads previous history for *that* context).
    - Close and reopen after switching context, verify correct history loads.
    - Test with different comments and posts.

# Known Bugs:
1. 当有的评论被折叠后，就无法通过点击统计面板里的链接定位到该评论.
2. 点击 "Chat" 链接后，模态框会打开，会有多余的一条消息：Gathering parents context.... 但是再点击其他上下文之后就没有了。只有正常的: Context loaded (xxx) xxxxx

        });

    /**
     * Generates the storage key for chat history.
     * @param {string} postId - The ID of the post.
     * @param {string} commentId - The ID of the comment.
     * @param {string} contextType - The context type ('parents', 'descendants', 'children').
     * @returns {string} The storage key.
     * @private
     */
    static _getChatHistoryKey(postId, commentId, contextType) {
        return `chatHistory_${postId}_${commentId}_${contextType}`;
    }

    /**
     * Saves the chat history for a specific comment and context type.
     * @param {string} postId - The ID of the post.
     * @param {string} commentId - The ID of the comment.
     * @param {string} contextType - The context type ('parents', 'descendants', 'children').
     * @param {Array<object>} history - The conversation history array to save.
     */
    static saveChatHistory(postId, commentId, contextType, history) {
        const key = this._getChatHistoryKey(postId, commentId, contextType);
        chrome.storage.local.set({ [key]: history }).catch(error => {
            console.error(`Error saving chat history for ${key}:`, error);
        });
    }

    /**
     * Retrieves the chat history for a specific comment and context type.
     * @param {string} postId - The ID of the post.
     * @param {string} commentId - The ID of the comment.
     * @param {string} contextType - The context type ('parents', 'descendants', 'children').
     * @returns {Promise<Array<object>|null>} The conversation history array or null if not found.
     */
    static async getChatHistory(postId, commentId, contextType) {
        const key = this._getChatHistoryKey(postId, commentId, contextType);
        try {
            const data = await chrome.storage.local.get(key);
            return data[key] || null; // Return the history array or null
        } catch (error) {
            console.error(`Error retrieving chat history for ${key}:`, error);
            return null;
        }
    }

    /**
     * Clears the chat history for a specific comment and context type.
     * @param {string} postId - The ID of the post.
     * @param {string} commentId - The ID of the comment.
     * @param {string} contextType - The context type ('parents', 'descendants', 'children').
     */
    static async clearChatHistory(postId, commentId, contextType) {
        const key = this._getChatHistoryKey(postId, commentId, contextType);
        chrome.storage.local.remove(key).catch(error => {
            console.error(`Error clearing chat history for ${key}:`, error);
        });
    }
}

// Make the class available globally
window.HNState = HNState;

好的，我看到 `src/hn-state.js` 文件中存在重复的方法定义。`_getChatHistoryKey`, `saveChatHistory`, `getChatHistory`, 和 `clearChatHistory` 方法在 `HNState` 类内部（第 43-91 行）已经定义了一次，然后在类的结束大括号 `}` 之后（第 95-147 行）又被错误地重复定义了一次。

我们需要移除类外部的这些重复定义。

这是修复此问题的 *SEARCH/REPLACE* 代码块：

```javascript
src/hn-state.js
<<<<<<< SEARCH
}

// Make the class available globally
     * @param {string} commentId - The ID of the comment.
     * @param {string} contextType - The context type ('parents', 'descendants', 'children').
     * @returns {string} The storage key.
     * @private
     */
    static _getChatHistoryKey(postId, commentId, contextType) {
        return `chatHistory_${postId}_${commentId}_${contextType}`;
    }

    /**
     * Saves the chat history for a specific comment and context type.
     * @param {string} postId - The ID of the post.
     * @param {string} commentId - The ID of the comment.
     * @param {string} contextType - The context type ('parents', 'descendants', 'children').
     * @param {Array<object>} history - The conversation history array to save.
     */
    static saveChatHistory(postId, commentId, contextType, history) {
        const key = this._getChatHistoryKey(postId, commentId, contextType);
        chrome.storage.local.set({ [key]: history }).catch(error => {
            console.error(`Error saving chat history for ${key}:`, error);
        });
    }

    /**
     * Retrieves the chat history for a specific comment and context type.
     * @param {string} postId - The ID of the post.
     * @param {string} commentId - The ID of the comment.
     * @param {string} contextType - The context type ('parents', 'descendants', 'children').
     * @returns {Promise<Array<object>|null>} The conversation history array or null if not found.
     */
    static async getChatHistory(postId, commentId, contextType) {
        const key = this._getChatHistoryKey(postId, commentId, contextType);
        try {
            const data = await chrome.storage.local.get(key);
            return data[key] || null; // Return the history array or null
        } catch (error) {
            console.error(`Error retrieving chat history for ${key}:`, error);
            return null;
        }
    }

    /**
     * Clears the chat history for a specific comment and context type.
     * @param {string} postId - The ID of the post.
     * @param {string} commentId - The ID of the comment.
     * @param {string} contextType - The context type ('parents', 'descendants', 'children').
     */
    static async clearChatHistory(postId, commentId, contextType) {
        const key = this._getChatHistoryKey(postId, commentId, contextType);
        chrome.storage.local.remove(key).catch(error => {
            console.error(`Error clearing chat history for ${key}:`, error);
        });
    }
}

  /**
   * Initializes the Chrome AI session if needed and available.
   * Displays messages related to session creation or unavailability.
   * @private
   */
  async _initializeChromeAISessionIfNeeded() {
      if (this.enhancer.isChomeAiAvailable !== HNEnhancer.CHROME_AI_AVAILABLE.YES) {
          // Re-check availability if not already confirmed as YES
          try {
              const availability = await window.ai.canCreateTextSession();
              this.enhancer.isChomeAiAvailable = availability;
              this.enhancer.logDebug(`Chrome AI availability re-check: ${availability}`);
          } catch (err) {
              console.error("Error re-checking AI availability:", err);
              this.enhancer.isChomeAiAvailable = HNEnhancer.CHROME_AI_AVAILABLE.NO;
          }
      }

      if (this.enhancer.isChomeAiAvailable === HNEnhancer.CHROME_AI_AVAILABLE.YES) {
          if (!this.aiSession) { // Only create if session doesn't exist
              this._displayMessage("Initializing Chrome AI session...", "system");
              try {
                  this.aiSession = await window.ai.createTextSession(); // Default options
                  this.enhancer.logDebug("Chrome AI session created.");
              } catch (aiError) {
                  console.error("Error creating Chrome AI session:", aiError);
                  this._displayMessage(`Error initializing Chrome AI session: ${aiError.message}.`, "system");
                  this.aiSession = null; // Ensure session is null on error
              }
          } else {
              this.enhancer.logDebug("Chrome AI session already exists.");
          }
      } else {
          this.enhancer.logDebug("Chrome AI selected but not available/ready.");
          this._displayMessage("Chrome Built-in AI is selected but not available or ready.", "system");
          // Optionally suggest changing settings
      }
  }

>>>>>>> REPLACE

是的，我理解您的需求。您想要改进聊天历史的保存和加载机制：

1. **保存时机改进**：
   - 当前：只要打开聊天或切换上下文类型，就会保存初始系统消息和上下文
   - 期望：只有在模型成功返回回复后才保存对话历史

2. **加载历史时的显示改进**：
   - 当前：显示完整的系统消息，包括所有评论内容
   - 期望：简化显示，只显示提示词和元数据（如"包含X条评论，共Y字符"），而不显示具体评论内容

3. **系统消息格式统一**：
   - 希望所有系统消息（包括"Context loaded"消息）使用一致的格式

我可以修改 `chat-modal.js` 中的相关代码来实现这些改进。主要需要修改：
1. `_gatherContextAndInitiateChat` 方法中的保存逻辑
2. 历史加载和显示逻辑
3. 系统消息的格式化方式

  /**
   * Initializes the Chrome AI session if needed and available.
   * Displays messages related to session creation or unavailability.
   * @private
   */
  async _initializeChromeAISessionIfNeeded() {
=======
  /**
   * Extracts context information from a system message.
   * @param {string} systemMessage - The system message content.
   * @returns {object} Object containing contextType, commentCount, and charCount.
   * @private
   */
  _extractContextInfoFromSystemMessage(systemMessage) {
      // Default values
      const result = {
          contextType: "unknown",
          commentCount: 0,
          charCount: 0
      };
      
      try {
          // Try to determine context type from the message
          if (systemMessage.includes("父评论 -> 目标评论")) {
              result.contextType = "parents";
          } else if (systemMessage.includes("目标评论 -> 后代评论")) {
              result.contextType = "descendants";
          } else if (systemMessage.includes("目标评论 -> 直接子评论")) {
              result.contextType = "children";
          }
          
          // Count comments by looking for comment format pattern
          const commentPattern = /\[\d+(?:\.\d+)*\] \(score:/g;
          const matches = systemMessage.match(commentPattern);
          result.commentCount = matches ? matches.length : 0;
          
          // Estimate character count (this is approximate)
          // Remove the prompt part and count the rest
          const promptEndIndex = systemMessage.indexOf("评论上下文:");
          if (promptEndIndex > 0) {
              const contextPart = systemMessage.substring(promptEndIndex);
              result.charCount = contextPart.length;
          } else {
              result.charCount = systemMessage.length;
          }
      } catch (error) {
          console.error("Error extracting context info from system message:", error);
      }
      
      return result;
  }

  /**
   * Initializes the Chrome AI session if needed and available.
   * Displays messages related to session creation or unavailability.
   * @private
   */
  async _initializeChromeAISessionIfNeeded() {

# 已完成改进 (2025-04-10):

## 聊天历史保存机制改进
- **问题**: 之前的实现会在打开聊天或切换上下文时就保存初始系统消息，即使用户没有发送任何消息
- **改进**: 
  - 只有在模型成功返回回复后才保存对话历史
  - 加载历史时简化系统消息显示，只显示上下文类型和统计信息，不显示完整评论内容
  - 添加了 `_extractContextInfoFromSystemMessage` 辅助方法来从系统消息中提取上下文信息
- **好处**:
  - 减少存储空间使用
  - 避免保存未完成的对话
  - 提高历史记录加载时的可读性

  /**
   * Extracts context information from a system message.
   * @param {string} systemMessage - The system message content.
   * @returns {object} Object containing contextType, commentCount, and charCount.
   * @private
   */
  _extractContextInfoFromSystemMessage(systemMessage) {
      // Default values
      const result = {
          contextType: "unknown",
          commentCount: 0,
          charCount: 0
      };
      
      try {
          // Try to determine context type from the message
          if (systemMessage.includes("父评论 -> 目标评论")) {
              result.contextType = "parents";
          } else if (systemMessage.includes("目标评论 -> 后代评论")) {
              result.contextType = "descendants";
          } else if (systemMessage.includes("目标评论 -> 直接子评论")) {
              result.contextType = "children";
          }
          
          // Count comments by looking for comment format pattern
          const commentPattern = /\[\d+(?:\.\d+)*\] \(score:/g;
          const matches = systemMessage.match(commentPattern);
          result.commentCount = matches ? matches.length : 0;
          
          // Estimate character count (this is approximate)
          // Remove the prompt part and count the rest
          const promptEndIndex = systemMessage.indexOf("评论上下文:");
          if (promptEndIndex > 0) {
              const contextPart = systemMessage.substring(promptEndIndex);
              result.charCount = contextPart.length;
          } else {
              result.charCount = systemMessage.length;
          }
      } catch (error) {
          console.error("Error extracting context info from system message:", error);
      }
      
      return result;
  }
=======
  /**
   * Extracts context information from a system message.
   * @param {string} systemMessage - The system message content.
   * @returns {object} Object containing contextType, commentCount, charCount, and promptText.
   * @private
   */
  _extractContextInfoFromSystemMessage(systemMessage) {
      // Default values
      const result = {
          contextType: "unknown",
          commentCount: 0,
          charCount: 0,
          promptText: "" // 存储指令部分文本
      };
      
      try {
          // 提取指令部分（从开头到"评论上下文:"之前）
          const promptEndIndex = systemMessage.indexOf("评论上下文:");
          if (promptEndIndex > 0) {
              result.promptText = systemMessage.substring(0, promptEndIndex).trim();
          }
          
          // 确定上下文类型
          if (systemMessage.includes("父评论 -> 目标评论")) {
              result.contextType = "parents";
          } else if (systemMessage.includes("目标评论 -> 后代评论")) {
              result.contextType = "descendants";
          } else if (systemMessage.includes("目标评论 -> 直接子评论")) {
              result.contextType = "children";
          }
          
          // 计算评论数量
          const commentPattern = /\[\d+(?:\.\d+)*\] \(score:/g;
          const matches = systemMessage.match(commentPattern);
          result.commentCount = matches ? matches.length : 0;
          
          // 计算评论部分的字符数
          if (promptEndIndex > 0) {
              const contextPart = systemMessage.substring(promptEndIndex);
              result.charCount = contextPart.length;
          } else {
              result.charCount = systemMessage.length;
          }
      } catch (error) {
          console.error("Error extracting context info from system message:", error);
      }
      
      return result;
  }

#### /ask 有没有办法获取这个post的标题？我把这个标题也加入到chat的 system 消息中的上下文里。  
> Warning: it's best to only add files that need changes to the chat.

#### 有没有办法获取这个post的标题？我把这个标题也加入到chat的 system 消息中的上下文里。  

是的，你可以获取帖子的标题并将其添加到聊天的系统消息中。DomUtils 类中已经有一个 `getHNPostTitle()` 方法可以用来获取当前帖子的标题。

你可以在 `chat-modal.js` 文件的 `_gatherContextAndInitiateChat` 方法中修改，在构建系统提示时添加帖子标题。以下是具体修改方案：

```javascript
// 在 _gatherContextAndInitiateChat 方法中，在构建 systemPrompt 之前添加
const postTitle = this.enhancer.domUtils.getHNPostTitle() || "未知标题";

// 然后修改 systemPrompt 变量，在开头添加帖子标题
const systemPrompt = `你是一个 Hacker News (HN) 评论助手。正在讨论的帖子标题是: "${postTitle}"

${systemPromptIntro}
每个评论都使用以下格式呈现，包含了评论的层级结构和元数据：

[层级路径] (score: 分数) <replies: 回复数> {downvotes: 踩数} 作者名: 评论内容

其中：
- 层级路径：如 [1], [1.2], [1.2.3] 表示评论在树中的位置
- 分数：表示评论的重要性分数（1000为最高）
- 回复数：表示该评论的直接回复数量
- 踩数：表示评论收到的负面评价数量

`;
```

这样修改后，每次打开聊天或切换上下文时，系统消息中都会包含当前帖子的标题，这样 LLM 就能了解整个讨论的主题背景，提供更相关的回复。

现在摘要功能应该能够正常工作，不再出现 "Gemini API请求缺少必要参数" 的错误。

  // Now expects messages array instead of systemPrompt/userPrompt
  const { apiKey, model, messages } = data;

// Handle Gemini API requests
async function handleGeminiRequest(data) {
  // Handle both formats: messages array or systemPrompt/userPrompt
  const { apiKey, model, messages, systemPrompt, userPrompt } = data;

  console.log("处理Gemini API请求，模型:", model);

  // Validate required parameters - support both formats
  if (!apiKey || !model || (!messages && (!systemPrompt || !userPrompt))) {
    console.error("Gemini API请求缺少必要参数 (apiKey, model, or messages/prompts)");
    throw new Error("Missing required parameters for Gemini API request");
  }

  // Convert systemPrompt/userPrompt format to messages format if needed
  let processedMessages = messages;
  if (!messages && systemPrompt && userPrompt) {
    processedMessages = [
      { role: "system", content: systemPrompt },
      { role: "user", content: userPrompt }
    ];
  }

<<<<<<< SEARCH
  // --- Adapt history for Gemini API ---
  // 1. Filter out system messages (handle separately if needed)
  // 2. Map 'assistant' role to 'model'
  // 3. Ensure alternating user/model roles, merging consecutive messages of the same role.
  // 4. Handle system prompt (if provided as 'system' role) by prepending to the first user message.

  let systemPromptContent = null;
  const geminiContents = [];
  let lastRole = null;

  for (const message of messages) {
      if (message.role === 'system') {
          systemPromptContent = message.content;
          continue; // Skip adding system message directly to contents
      }

      const currentRole = message.role === 'assistant' ? 'model' : 'user';
      let currentContent = message.content;

      // DO NOT Prepend system prompt anymore. It will be handled by systemInstruction field.
      // if (systemPromptContent && currentRole === 'user' && geminiContents.length === 0) {
      //     currentContent = `${systemPromptContent}\n\n---\n\n${currentContent}`;
      //     systemPromptContent = null; // Only prepend once
      // }

      if (geminiContents.length > 0 && currentRole === lastRole) {
          // Merge consecutive messages of the same role
          const lastMessage = geminiContents[geminiContents.length - 1];
          lastMessage.parts[0].text += `\n\n---\n\n${currentContent}`; // Combine content
      } else {
          // Add new message with the correct role
          geminiContents.push({
              role: currentRole,
              parts: [{ text: currentContent }],
          });
          lastRole = currentRole;
      }
  }
=======

  // 4. Handle system prompt (if provided as 'system' role) by prepending to the first user message.

  let systemPromptContent = null;
  const geminiContents = [];
  let lastRole = null;

  for (const message of processedMessages) {
      if (message.role === 'system') {
          systemPromptContent = message.content;

  }

这些修改使 `handleGeminiRequest` 函数能够同时处理两种格式的请求：
1. 使用 `messages` 数组的格式（聊天功能使用）
2. 使用 `systemPrompt` 和 `userPrompt` 字段的格式（摘要功能使用）

这样，无论是聊天功能还是摘要功能，都可以正常使用 Gemini API，不会出现参数缺失的错误。

pnpm run dev-build

# 在聊天中实现点击评论引用跳转到对应评论

要在聊天模态框中实现类似摘要面板的功能，让用户能够点击LLM回复中的评论引用（如`[1.2]`格式的路径）直接跳转到对应的评论，我们需要进行以下修改：

## 实现思路

1. 在`chat-modal.js`中，需要在显示LLM回复时，解析回复内容中的评论路径引用
2. 将这些路径引用转换为可点击的链接，并存储对应的评论ID
3. 为这些链接添加点击事件处理器，实现跳转到对应评论的功能
4. 确保在切换上下文时，正确更新路径到评论ID的映射

## 具体实现步骤

### 1. 在`ChatModal`类中添加路径到评论ID的映射

在`ChatModal`类的构造函数中添加一个新的属性：

```javascript
constructor(enhancerInstance) {
  // 现有代码...
  this.commentPathToIdMap = new Map(); // 存储路径到评论ID的映射
  // 现有代码...
}
```

### 2. 在`_gatherContextAndInitiateChat`方法中构建映射

在收集评论上下文时，构建路径到ID的映射：

```javascript
async _gatherContextAndInitiateChat(contextType = this.currentContextType) {
  // 现有代码...
  
  // 在处理contextArray后，构建路径到ID的映射
  this.commentPathToIdMap = new Map();
  contextArray.forEach(comment => {
    this.commentPathToIdMap.set(comment.path, comment.id);
  });
  
  // 现有代码...
}
```

### 3. 修改`_displayMessage`方法，处理LLM回复中的评论引用

```javascript
_displayMessage(text, sender, isStreaming = false) {
  // 现有代码...
  
  // 如果是LLM回复，处理评论引用
  if (sender === "llm") {
    // 使用markdownUtils处理评论引用
    const processedText = this.enhancer.markdownUtils.replacePathsWithCommentLinks(
      this.enhancer.markdownUtils.convertMarkdownToHTML(text),
      this.commentPathToIdMap
    );
    
    // 更新文本内容
    if (isStreaming && this.currentLlmMessageElement) {
      this.currentLlmMessageElement.innerHTML += processedText;
    } else {
      textElement.innerHTML = processedText;
    }
  } else {
    // 非LLM消息的现有处理逻辑...
    textElement.innerHTML = this.enhancer.markdownUtils.convertMarkdownToHTML(text);
  }
  
  // 现有代码...
  
  // 为新添加的评论链接添加点击事件
  if (sender === "llm") {
    const newLinks = (isStreaming && this.currentLlmMessageElement 
      ? this.currentLlmMessageElement 
      : textElement).querySelectorAll('[data-comment-link="true"]');
      
    newLinks.forEach(link => {
      link.addEventListener("click", (e) => {
        e.preventDefault();
        const id = link.dataset.commentId;
        const comment = document.getElementById(id);
        if (comment) {
          // 使用navigation模块跳转到评论
          this.enhancer.navigation.setCurrentComment(comment);
          // 关闭聊天模态框（可选）
          // this.close();
        } else {
          console.error("Failed to find DOM element for comment id:", id);
        }
      });
    });
  }
}
```

### 4. 确保在切换上下文时更新映射

在`_switchContext`方法中，确保在重新收集上下文后更新映射：

```javascript
async _switchContext(newContextType) {
  // 现有代码...
  
  // _gatherContextAndInitiateChat会重新构建commentPathToIdMap
  await this._gatherContextAndInitiateChat(newContextType);
  
  // 现有代码...
}
```

## 完整实现

这个实现利用了已有的`markdownUtils.replacePathsWithCommentLinks`方法，该方法在摘要面板中已经被使用。它会查找文本中的`[x.y.z]`格式的路径引用，并将其转换为带有`data-comment-link="true"`和`data-comment-id="xxx"`属性的链接。

然后，我们为这些链接添加点击事件处理器，使用`navigation.setCurrentComment`方法跳转到对应的评论。

这样，用户就可以在聊天模态框中点击LLM回复中的评论引用，直接跳转到对应的评论了，实现与摘要面板相同的功能。

> Tokens: 58k sent, 1.1k received. Cost: $0.19 message, $3.54 session.  
> Warning: it's best to only add files that need changes to the chat.  
> https://aider.chat/docs/troubleshooting/edit-errors.html

  /**
   * Displays a message in the conversation area.
   * @param {string} text - The message text.
   * @param {'user' | 'llm' | 'system'} sender - Who sent the message.
   * @private
   */
  _displayMessage(text, sender, isStreaming = false) {
    // Find and remove the specific "Gathering context..." message element if it exists
    const gatheringMsgElement = Array.from(this.conversationArea.querySelectorAll(".chat-message-system"))
                                     .find(el => el.textContent.includes("Gathering context..."));
    if (gatheringMsgElement) {
        gatheringMsgElement.remove();
    }

    // Clear any remaining initial placeholder like "Loading context..."
    const initialPlaceholder = this.conversationArea.querySelector("p > em");
    if (initialPlaceholder) {
        initialPlaceholder.remove();
    }


    // If streaming and it's an LLM message, update the existing element
    if (sender === "llm" && isStreaming && this.currentLlmMessageElement) {
      // Append text, rendering markdown for the new chunk
      // Note: Simple markdown rendering might not perfectly handle partial tags across chunks.
      this.currentLlmMessageElement.innerHTML +=
        this.enhancer.markdownUtils.renderSimpleMarkdown(text);
    } else {
      // Otherwise, create a new message element
      const messageElement = document.createElement("div");
      messageElement.classList.add("chat-message", `chat-message-${sender}`);

      const senderElement = document.createElement("strong");
      senderElement.textContent =
        sender === "user" ? "You: " : sender === "llm" ? "LLM: " : "System: ";

      const textElement = document.createElement("span");
      // Render markdown for the complete initial text
      textElement.innerHTML =
        this.enhancer.markdownUtils.convertMarkdownToHTML(text);

      messageElement.appendChild(senderElement);
      messageElement.appendChild(textElement);
      this.conversationArea.appendChild(messageElement);

      // If it's the start of an LLM stream, store the text element reference
      if (sender === "llm" && isStreaming) {
        this.currentLlmMessageElement = textElement;
      } else {
        this.currentLlmMessageElement = null; // Reset if not streaming LLM
      }
    }

    // Scroll to bottom
    this.conversationArea.scrollTop = this.conversationArea.scrollHeight;
  }
=======
  /**
   * Displays a message in the conversation area.
   * @param {string} text - The message text.
   * @param {'user' | 'llm' | 'system'} sender - Who sent the message.
   * @private
   */
  _displayMessage(text, sender, isStreaming = false) {
    // Find and remove the specific "Gathering context..." message element if it exists
    const gatheringMsgElement = Array.from(this.conversationArea.querySelectorAll(".chat-message-system"))
                                     .find(el => el.textContent.includes("Gathering context..."));
    if (gatheringMsgElement) {
        gatheringMsgElement.remove();
    }

    // Clear any remaining initial placeholder like "Loading context..."
    const initialPlaceholder = this.conversationArea.querySelector("p > em");
    if (initialPlaceholder) {
        initialPlaceholder.remove();
    }

    // If streaming and it's an LLM message, update the existing element
    if (sender === "llm" && isStreaming && this.currentLlmMessageElement) {
      // 处理LLM回复中的评论引用
      const processedText = this.enhancer.markdownUtils.replacePathsWithCommentLinks(
        this.enhancer.markdownUtils.convertMarkdownToHTML(text),
        this.commentPathToIdMap
      );
      
      // Append text, rendering markdown for the new chunk
      this.currentLlmMessageElement.innerHTML += processedText;
      
      // 为新添加的评论链接添加点击事件
      this._addCommentLinkHandlers(this.currentLlmMessageElement);
    } else {
      // Otherwise, create a new message element
      const messageElement = document.createElement("div");
      messageElement.classList.add("chat-message", `chat-message-${sender}`);

      const senderElement = document.createElement("strong");
      senderElement.textContent =
        sender === "user" ? "You: " : sender === "llm" ? "LLM: " : "System: ";

      const textElement = document.createElement("span");
      
      // 根据发送者类型处理文本
      if (sender === "llm") {
        // 处理LLM回复中的评论引用
        textElement.innerHTML = this.enhancer.markdownUtils.replacePathsWithCommentLinks(
          this.enhancer.markdownUtils.convertMarkdownToHTML(text),
          this.commentPathToIdMap
        );
      } else {
        // 普通Markdown渲染
        textElement.innerHTML = this.enhancer.markdownUtils.convertMarkdownToHTML(text);
      }

      messageElement.appendChild(senderElement);
      messageElement.appendChild(textElement);
      this.conversationArea.appendChild(messageElement);

      // If it's the start of an LLM stream, store the text element reference
      if (sender === "llm" && isStreaming) {
        this.currentLlmMessageElement = textElement;
      } else {
        this.currentLlmMessageElement = null; // Reset if not streaming LLM
      }
      
      // 为LLM消息中的评论链接添加点击事件
      if (sender === "llm") {
        this._addCommentLinkHandlers(textElement);
      }
    }

    // Scroll to bottom
    this.conversationArea.scrollTop = this.conversationArea.scrollHeight;
  }
  
  /**
   * 为评论链接添加点击事件处理器
   * @param {HTMLElement} container - 包含评论链接的容器元素
   * @private
   */
  _addCommentLinkHandlers(container) {
    const commentLinks = container.querySelectorAll('[data-comment-link="true"]');
    commentLinks.forEach(link => {
      // 移除现有的事件监听器（如果有）
      const newLink = link.cloneNode(true);
      link.parentNode.replaceChild(newLink, link);
      
      newLink.addEventListener("click", (e) => {
        e.preventDefault();
        const id = newLink.dataset.commentId;
        const comment = document.getElementById(id);
        if (comment) {
          // 使用navigation模块跳转到评论
          this.enhancer.navigation.setCurrentComment(comment);
          // 可选：关闭聊天模态框
          // this.close();
        } else {
          console.error("Failed to find DOM element for comment id:", id);
        }
      });
    });
  }
>>>>>>> REPLACE

<<<<<<< SEARCH
  /**
   * Extracts context information from a system message.
   * @param {string} systemMessage - The system message content.
   * @returns {object} Object containing contextType, commentCount, charCount, and promptText.
   * @private
   */
  _extractContextInfoFromSystemMessage(systemMessage) {
      // Default values
      const result = {
          contextType: "unknown",
          commentCount: 0,
          charCount: 0,
          promptText: "" // 存储指令部分文本
      };

      try {
          // 提取指令部分（从开头到"评论上下文:"之前）
          const promptEndIndex = systemMessage.indexOf("评论上下文:");
          if (promptEndIndex > 0) {
              result.promptText = systemMessage.substring(0, promptEndIndex).trim();
          }

          // 确定上下文类型
          if (systemMessage.includes("父评论 -> 目标评论")) {
              result.contextType = "parents";
          } else if (systemMessage.includes("目标评论 -> 后代评论")) {
              result.contextType = "descendants";
          } else if (systemMessage.includes("目标评论 -> 直接子评论")) {
              result.contextType = "children";
          }

          // 计算评论数量
          const commentPattern = /\[\d+(?:\.\d+)*\] \(score:/g;
          const matches = systemMessage.match(commentPattern);
          result.commentCount = matches ? matches.length : 0;

          // 计算评论部分的字符数
          if (promptEndIndex > 0) {
              const contextPart = systemMessage.substring(promptEndIndex);
              result.charCount = contextPart.length;
          } else {
              result.charCount = systemMessage.length;
          }
      } catch (error) {
          console.error("Error extracting context info from system message:", error);
      }

      return result;
  }
=======
  /**
   * Extracts context information from a system message.
   * @param {string} systemMessage - The system message content.
   * @returns {object} Object containing contextType, commentCount, charCount, and promptText.
   * @private
   */
  _extractContextInfoFromSystemMessage(systemMessage) {
      // Default values
      const result = {
          contextType: "unknown",
          commentCount: 0,
          charCount: 0,
          promptText: "" // 存储指令部分文本
      };

      try {
          // 提取指令部分（从开头到"评论上下文:"之前）
          const promptEndIndex = systemMessage.indexOf("评论上下文:");
          if (promptEndIndex > 0) {
              result.promptText = systemMessage.substring(0, promptEndIndex).trim();
          }

          // 确定上下文类型
          if (systemMessage.includes("父评论 -> 目标评论")) {
              result.contextType = "parents";
          } else if (systemMessage.includes("目标评论 -> 后代评论")) {
              result.contextType = "descendants";
          } else if (systemMessage.includes("目标评论 -> 直接子评论")) {
              result.contextType = "children";
          }

          // 计算评论数量
          const commentPattern = /\[\d+(?:\.\d+)*\] \(score:/g;
          const matches = systemMessage.match(commentPattern);
          result.commentCount = matches ? matches.length : 0;

          // 计算评论部分的字符数
          if (promptEndIndex > 0) {
              const contextPart = systemMessage.substring(promptEndIndex);
              result.charCount = contextPart.length;
          } else {
              result.charCount = systemMessage.length;
          }
      } catch (error) {
          console.error("Error extracting context info from system message:", error);
      }

      return result;
  }
  
  /**
   * 从系统消息中提取评论路径到ID的映射
   * @param {string} systemMessage - 系统消息内容
   * @private
   */
  _extractCommentPathsFromSystemMessage(systemMessage) {
      try {
          // 重置映射
          this.commentPathToIdMap = new Map();
          
          // 查找所有评论路径和ID
          const commentLines = systemMessage.split('\n\n');
          const pathIdRegex = /\[(\d+(?:\.\d+)*)\].*?(\d+):/;
          
          commentLines.forEach(line => {
              const match = line.match(pathIdRegex);
              if (match && match.length >= 3) {
                  const path = match[1];
                  const id = match[2];
                  this.commentPathToIdMap.set(path, id);
              }
          });
          
          this.enhancer.logDebug(`从系统消息中提取了 ${this.commentPathToIdMap.size} 个评论路径到ID的映射`);
      } catch (error) {
          console.error("从系统消息中提取评论路径到ID的映射时出错:", error);
      }
  }
>>>>>>> REPLACE
````

现在，聊天模态框中的评论引用将可以点击并跳转到对应的评论，就像摘要面板中一样。这个实现利用了已有的`markdownUtils.replacePathsWithCommentLinks`方法，并添加了必要的事件处理逻辑。

主要改进包括：
1. 添加了`commentPathToIdMap`属性来存储评论路径到ID的映射
2. 在收集上下文时构建这个映射
3. 修改了`_displayMessage`方法，使用`replacePathsWithCommentLinks`处理LLM回复
4. 添加了`_addCommentLinkHandlers`方法为评论链接添加点击事件
5. 添加了`_extractCommentPathsFromSystemMessage`方法从历史系统消息中提取映射

#### 不需要修改 prompt 指令，来让大模型用正确的格式来引用么？  

您提出了一个很好的问题。确实，我们应该修改系统提示，让大模型在聊天中使用正确的格式来引用评论。目前，大模型可能不知道如何正确引用评论路径，这会导致点击功能无法正常工作。

让我们修改系统提示，明确告诉大模型如何引用评论：

src/chat-modal.js
````javascript
<<<<<<< SEARCH
      // --- Prepare Initial System Prompt based on Context Type ---
      let systemPromptIntro = "";
      let contextStructureDesc = "";

      switch (contextType) {
          case 'parents':
              systemPromptIntro = `你是一个 Hacker News (HN) 评论助手。下面提供了一系列 HN 评论，这些评论来自同一个帖子下的一个讨论分支，按时间顺序从最顶层的父评论到用户发起聊天的目标评论排列。`;
              break;
          case 'descendants':
              systemPromptIntro = `你是一个 Hacker News (HN) 评论助手。下面提供了用户发起聊天的目标评论以及它的所有后代评论（回复）。`;
              break;
          case 'children':
              systemPromptIntro = `你是一个 Hacker News (HN) 评论助手。下面提供了用户发起聊天的目标评论以及它的所有直接子评论（直接回复）。`;
              break;
      }

      // 获取帖子标题
      const postTitle = this.enhancer.domUtils.getHNPostTitle() || "未知标题";

      const systemPrompt = `你是一个 Hacker News (HN) 评论助手。正在讨论的帖子标题是: "${postTitle}"

${systemPromptIntro}
每个评论都使用以下格式呈现，包含了评论的层级结构和元数据：

[层级路径] (score: 分数) <replies: 回复数> {downvotes: 踩数} 作者名: 评论内容

其中：
- 层级路径：如 [1], [1.2], [1.2.3] 表示评论在树中的位置
- 分数：表示评论的重要性分数（1000为最高）
- 回复数：表示该评论的直接回复数量
- 踩数：表示评论收到的负面评价数量

`;
=======
      // --- Prepare Initial System Prompt based on Context Type ---
      let systemPromptIntro = "";
      let contextStructureDesc = "";

      switch (contextType) {
          case 'parents':
              systemPromptIntro = `你是一个 Hacker News (HN) 评论助手。下面提供了一系列 HN 评论，这些评论来自同一个帖子下的一个讨论分支，按时间顺序从最顶层的父评论到用户发起聊天的目标评论排列。`;
              break;
          case 'descendants':
              systemPromptIntro = `你是一个 Hacker News (HN) 评论助手。下面提供了用户发起聊天的目标评论以及它的所有后代评论（回复）。`;
              break;
          case 'children':
              systemPromptIntro = `你是一个 Hacker News (HN) 评论助手。下面提供了用户发起聊天的目标评论以及它的所有直接子评论（直接回复）。`;

${systemPromptIntro}
每个评论都使用以下格式呈现，包含了评论的层级结构和元数据：

[层级路径] (score: 分数) <replies: 回复数> {downvotes: 踩数} 作者名: 评论内容

其中：
- 层级路径：如 [1], [1.2], [1.2.3] 表示评论在树中的位置
- 分数：表示评论的重要性分数（1000为最高）
- 回复数：表示该评论的直接回复数量
- 踩数：表示评论收到的负面评价数量

当你需要引用特定评论时，请使用其层级路径，格式为 [1.2.3]。这样用户就可以点击这些引用直接跳转到对应的评论。例如：
- "正如 [1.2] 中提到的..."
- "我同意 [2.1] 的观点，但是..."
- "根据 [1] 和 [3.2] 的讨论..."

请确保在你的回复中使用这种格式引用评论，这样用户就可以轻松地查看原始评论内容。
`;

# TODO:

# 已完成改进 (2025-04-10):

## 聊天历史保存机制改进
- **问题**: 之前的实现会在打开聊天或切换上下文时就保存初始系统消息，即使用户没有发送任何消息
- **改进**: 
  - 只有在模型成功返回回复后才保存对话历史
  - 加载历史时简化系统消息显示，只显示上下文类型和统计信息，不显示完整评论内容
  - 添加了 `_extractContextInfoFromSystemMessage` 辅助方法来从系统消息中提取上下文信息
- **好处**:
  - 减少存储空间使用
  - 避免保存未完成的对话
  - 提高历史记录加载时的可读性

# 已完成改进 (2025-04-10):

## 聊天历史保存机制改进
- **问题**: 之前的实现会在打开聊天或切换上下文时就保存初始系统消息，即使用户没有发送任何消息
- **改进**: 
  - 只有在模型成功返回回复后才保存对话历史
  - 加载历史时简化系统消息显示，只显示上下文类型和统计信息，不显示完整评论内容
  - 添加了 `_extractContextInfoFromSystemMessage` 辅助方法来从系统消息中提取上下文信息
- **好处**:
  - 减少存储空间使用
  - 避免保存未完成的对话
  - 提高历史记录加载时的可读性

## 聊天模态框中评论引用点击跳转功能
- **功能**: 在聊天模态框中点击LLM回复中的评论引用（如`[1.2]`格式的路径）可以直接跳转到对应的评论
- **实现细节**:
  - 添加了 `commentPathToIdMap` 属性来存储评论路径到ID的映射
  - 在收集上下文时构建这个映射关系
  - 修改了 `_displayMessage` 方法，使用 `markdownUtils.replacePathsWithCommentLinks` 处理LLM回复
  - 添加了 `_addCommentLinkHandlers` 方法为评论链接添加点击事件
  - 添加了 `_extractCommentPathsFromSystemMessage` 方法从历史系统消息中提取映射
  - 更新了系统提示，指导LLM使用正确的格式引用评论

#### 现在还缺少一个对整个post的聊天功能。这个人口可以放到标题下面的那个header那里。类似于 ‘summarize all comments’ 这个按钮的位置。类似于把这个看成根节点。此时就没有 parents这种上下文的类型了。而且其他两种类型的上下文里，也不需要考虑其本身的内容，因为这个不是个评论。仅仅代表是这个post本身。  

我将实现一个对整个帖子的聊天功能，将聊天入口放在标题下方的导航栏中，类似于"summarize all comments"按钮的位置。这个功能将把整个帖子作为根节点，不需要"parents"上下文类型，并且在其他上下文类型中不需要考虑帖子本身的内容。

以下是需要进行的修改：

1. 在`src/ui-components.js`中添加注入帖子聊天链接的方法
2. 在`src/hn-enhancer.js`中调用该方法
3. 在`src/chat-modal.js`中修改上下文处理逻辑，以支持帖子级别的聊天

下面是具体的代码修改：

  /**
   * Opens the chat modal.
   * @param {HTMLElement} commentElement - The specific comment element (.athing.comtr) to chat about.
   * @param {string} postId - The ID of the parent post.
   */
  open(commentElement, postId) {
    if (!this.modalElement) {
      this.enhancer.logDebug("Modal element not found, cannot open.");
      return;
    }
    if (!postId) {
        console.error("ChatModal.open called without a postId.");
        // Optionally display an error to the user
        return;
    }
    this.targetCommentElement = commentElement;
    this.currentPostId = postId; // Store the post ID
    const commentId = this.enhancer.domUtils.getCommentId(commentElement);
    this.enhancer.logInfo(`Opening chat for post ${postId}, comment ID: ${commentId}`);

    // Reset state (partially, history might be loaded)
    this.conversationArea.innerHTML = "<p><em>Gathering context...</em></p>"; // Clear previous chat
    this.inputElement.value = "";
    this.inputElement.disabled = true; // Disable input until context/history is loaded
    this.sendButton.disabled = true;
    // DO NOT clear conversationHistory here, it will be loaded or set in _gatherContext...
    // this.conversationHistory = [];

    this.modalElement.style.display = "flex"; // Show the modal
    // Don't focus input yet, wait for load

    // Trigger context/history loading and potential chat initiation
    this._gatherContextAndInitiateChat(); // Default context type is used initially
  }

   * Opens the chat modal for a specific comment.

   * @param {string} postId - The ID of the parent post.
   */
  open(commentElement, postId) {
    if (!this.modalElement) {
      this.enhancer.logDebug("Modal element not found, cannot open.");
      return;
    }
    if (!postId) {
        console.error("ChatModal.open called without a postId.");
        // Optionally display an error to the user
        return;
    }
    this.isPostChat = false; // This is a comment-level chat
    this.targetCommentElement = commentElement;
    this.currentPostId = postId; // Store the post ID
    const commentId = this.enhancer.domUtils.getCommentId(commentElement);
    this.enhancer.logInfo(`Opening chat for post ${postId}, comment ID: ${commentId}`);

    // Reset state (partially, history might be loaded)
    this.conversationArea.innerHTML = "<p><em>Gathering context...</em></p>"; // Clear previous chat
    this.inputElement.value = "";
    this.inputElement.disabled = true; // Disable input until context/history is loaded

    // Trigger context/history loading and potential chat initiation

  }
  
  /**
   * Opens the chat modal for the entire post.
   * @param {string} postId - The ID of the post to chat about.
   */
  openForPost(postId) {
    if (!this.modalElement) {
      this.enhancer.logDebug("Modal element not found, cannot open.");
      return;
    }
    if (!postId) {
      console.error("ChatModal.openForPost called without a postId.");
      return;
    }
    
    this.isPostChat = true; // This is a post-level chat
    this.targetCommentElement = null; // No specific comment
    this.currentPostId = postId;
    this.enhancer.logInfo(`Opening chat for entire post ${postId}`);
    
    // Update modal title
    const titleElement = this.modalElement.querySelector(".modal-header h2");
    if (titleElement) {
      titleElement.textContent = "Chat about Post";
    }
    
    // Reset state
    this.conversationArea.innerHTML = "<p><em>Gathering post context...</em></p>";
    this.inputElement.value = "";
    this.inputElement.disabled = true;
    this.sendButton.disabled = true;
    
    // Show the modal
    this.modalElement.style.display = "flex";
    
    // Trigger context gathering for post
    this._gatherPostContextAndInitiateChat();
  }
